name: USPS ANNOUNCEMENT (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: 📎 18326 post office DESTROYED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | **[ Nearly 50,000 strong have signed my emergency petition to STOP Trump from stealing this election -- _but I 'm still missing your name. _](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")**

**[_It 's absolutely critical I gather 50,000 signatures before midnight to help RESCUE the post office from Trump's sabotage. Will you take 10 seconds to add your name right away? The integrity of our entire election is on the line. >> _](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")**

-Ben Ray

\-- Original Message -- **[TOP TRUMP DONOR APPOINTED TO LEAD POST OFFICE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")** [SIGN THE PETITION: We CANNOT allow Trump and his new postmaster general to dismantle the post office -- and SABOTAGE our ability to safely vote by mail. Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and DENOUNCE Trump's unbelievable appointment >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs") | Wow. One of Trump's TOP Republican donors was just appointed to lead the post office.

His hand-picked crony will oversee one of the BIGGEST vote-by-mail elections in our history -- **[this ploy should disturb every single one of us.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")**

[**_50,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: Ben Ray just launched an emergency petition to SAVE the post office and STOP Trump 's new postmaster general from sabotaging Americans' ability to vote by mail. He needs 50,000 signatures before midnight. Will you sign immediately? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")
** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")**
---
We need to move NOW.

**[FIRST:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")** Trump learned this could be the BIGGEST vote-by-mail election in our country's history.

**[THEN:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")** He REJECTED emergency post office funds to keep it open during this crisis.

**[NOW:](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")** One of Trump's TOP DONORS was just named postmaster general -- he'll oversee MILLIONS of Americans' vote-by-mail ballots.

One thing has never been more clear:

**[Trump is terrified he'll lose this election -- so he's trying to stop Americans from voting by mail and voting him OUT of office.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")**
**_[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We must NOT let Trump corrupt our post office and sabotage this election from the inside. Ben Ray needs 50,000 signatures on his emergency petition to RESCUE the post office and STOP Trump's disgusting ploy. Will you sign immediately? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab89/2108342077/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200521_em_pet_b1_uav_ia_rs")_**
Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab8e/2108342077/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab8f/2108342077/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab8c/2108342077/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab8d/2108342077/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab82/2108342077/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab83/2108342077/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab8f/2108342077/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b15b/18e32a7f/4c0ae193/7b21ab80/2108342077/VEsEBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Aaron Slutkin
subject: Another one down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
The Admiral just wrapped up his last debate, crew -- and we couldn't be more proud. He laid out a comprehensive, compassionate vision to keep Iowa moving into the future.
|
---
| |
---

| | The Admiral just wrapped up his last debate, crew -- and we couldn't be more proud. He laid out a comprehensive, compassionate vision to keep Iowa moving into the future. We need to get Admiral Mike to Washington, working for us. Outside groups are spending OVER $8 million on ads and now they're attacking the Admiral. We need to respond. [_**Can you chip in right now? With just 12 days to go, every penny is crucial.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a6/3519395591/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_L1") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a7/3519395591/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_abx5")
---
[Chip in $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a0/3519395591/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_abx10")
---
[Chip in $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a1/3519395591/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_abx25")
---
[Other amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a2/3519395591/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_abxother")
---
Whatever the issue, the Admiral can fall back on his experience, whether it's his time running the Navy's department of legislative affairs or as a parent to a special needs child.
**His priorities are clear:**
* Fix our agricultural infrastructure, because when our farmers prosper, Iowa thrives.
* Ensure every Iowan can get comprehensive, affordable health care, just like the Admiral benefited from in the Navy.
* Be an independent voice for Iowa in Washington.

Joni Ernst lets her party and her dark-money donors run the show, but Mike has the leadership, independence, and courage to make decisions based on what Iowans need, not special interests.
[_**We can do all of this and more, but we need your help today. But we need adequate resources to get us across the finish line. Can you help us with a donation to the Franken Defense Fund today?**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2557/33365068/4a7db666/3f8bc6a3/3519395591/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_L2")

---
Thank you,
Aaron Slutkin
Communications Director

name: Tina Ramirez
subject: We need to come together as Republicans
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
| | | Friend - Please look at the letter that I have signed with fellow congressional candidates about the nomination process. We need to come together as Republicans. Read below: **Delegates of the 7th District** : _As candidates for Congress competing with each other for the nomination in the 7th District, we have taken this extraordinary step of writing you together to express our concerns and enlist your help. Make no mistake about it, the Republican nominee in our district can beat Abigail Spanberger. But to do that, we must all work to ensure the process to nominate our candidate is done with a goal of helping the eventual nominee come out of the process as strong as possible to help us win in November._ _Months ago, the 7th district committee voted to nominate our candidate by convention, a vote we all supported. Originally the Committee selected April 25 as the convention date to ensure the nominee had as much time as possible to build their campaign infrastructure for the general election. COVID-19 changed a lot of those plans._ _The committee chose a convention in large part to ensure that the party’s nominee would have to be selected by a majority vote (50% plus 1) to emerge with the majority of Republican support. A primary or party canvas allows plurality voting, but a convention - with multi-voting and multiple ballots – does not. If it did, it would not in fact, be a convention. Because of COVID-19, the Committee is entertaining a drive through convention, where voters drive to the Kings Dominion area , cast their ballots, and leave. I think we can all agree that despite the late date of July 18, the likelihood of a convened normal convention is highly unlikely._ _Which means the committee has to seriously start planning for a process of drive through voting._ _We as candidates competing for this important nomination, believe that it is within the Republican Party’s interest that the nominee be chosen by a majority vote of the delegates eligible to participate in the convention. That can only happen with ranked choice voting. It doesn’t add any time or effort to the balloting process, it just allows for a process that ensures the strongest possible candidate emerges as the nominee and ensures the Republican party remains unified ahead of a very challenging election. Without that unity, without that majority, winning in the fall becomes extraordinarily difficult._ _We ask that as voting delegates, you join us in communicating with your local party leadership, either through email or phone call, and ask them to support a system that provides unity and the most broad level of support for the eventual Republican Nominee. Click here to find your 7th District Committee representative and contact them now! Tell them to support a majority vote with ranked choice voting, and help our nominee win in November!_ _Sincerely,_
---
Tina Ramirez | |
---|---
|
John McGuire | |
---|---
|
Andrew Knaggs | |
---|---
|
---
**[Website](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-i/) | [Facebook](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-d/) | [Twitter](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-h/) | [Instagram](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-k/) | **[**Donate**](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-u/)
| | | | |
---|---|---|---|---
| [Edit your subscription](https://tinaramirez.updatemyprofile.com/r-jkmildt-A9B7CFE7-udthdyhkil-r) | [Unsubscribe](https://tinaramirez.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jkmildt-udthdyhkil-y/) | | |

name: Team Hutch
subject: Gazette Mail: Hutchison right choice for Supreme Court Division 3
body:
https://www.wvgazettemail.com/opinion/editorial/gazette-mail-editorial-hutchison-right-choice-for-supreme-court-division-3/article_fcfb0c29-8a65-53d0-800a-2f4042c43156.html [https://www.wvgazettemail.com/opinion/editorial/gazette-mail-editorial-hutchison-right-choice-for-supreme-court-division-3/article_fcfb0c29-8a65-53d0-800a-2f4042c43156.html]
Dear Friend:
Earlier this week the the Gazette-Mail gave a ringing endorsement for returning Justice John Hutchison to the bench of the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals. Their endorsement echoed the hallmarks of John's judicial career: integrity, stability, and fairness.
https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Charleston Gazette-Mail ENDORSEMENT [https://www.wvgazettemail.com/opinion/editorial/gazette-mail-editorial-hutchison-right-choice-for-supreme-court-division-3/article_fcfb0c29-8a65-53d0-800a-2f4042c43156.html]
Gov. Jim Justice appointed an unprecedented three justices to the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals after the fallout of the spending scandal, impeachment and criminal charges that engulfed the high court in 2018.
Of those appointments, only one was an actual judge with experience, John Hutchison. Hutchison took over for former justice Allen Loughry, who was convicted of federal fraud and witness-tampering charges, among others. Since his appointment, Hutchison has done a good job of restoring integrity to the seat, which is one of the reasons the Gazette-Mail endorses him in the election for the remainder of Loughry’s unexpired term. The term lasts for four years and will be decided in the primary election.
Before joining the Supreme Court, Hutchison had been a circuit judge in Raleigh County since 1995. Experience matters, especially in the judiciary. Most circuit judges are apolitical stewards of the law, which is exactly what West Virginia’s Supreme Court needs after the disaster of 2018, and other previous instances where undue business and political interests held sway.
Hutchison judges cases on their merits, not on ideology or outside pressures and persuasions. That’s what the state’s high court should be — a neutral arbiter that operates with transparency and gives everyone equal access to justice.
He has worked well with the other justices of the Supreme Court, so far, acting as a stabilizing agent in a turbulent time. We think he will continue to provide stability and fairness going forward.
West Virginians deserve equal access to justice, and they must be able to trust their highest court. Hutchison will help meet both of those goals.
Make a donation and Keep Our Supreme Court on the right path. [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]
Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/justicejohnhutchison] Contact Info:Committee to Keep Justice Hutchison
PO Box 5176
Beckley, WV 25801
United States
Twitter [https://twitter.com/justicehutch]

https://www.justicehutch.com/donate [https://www.justicehutch.com/donate]

subject: The Sierra Club endorsed our campaign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:

Peter Ohio is so beautiful. How lucky we are to have Lake Erie to our north, the Ohio River to our south, and the Cuyahoga Valley National Recreation Area so convenient to the Cleveland area! But we know that it will take hard work, not luck, to preserve our clean air and water. Our natural resources are essential to our health and to our economy, and during this pandemic we have been reminded how important nature is to our happiness -- how it restores and refreshes us. _We must work to ensure that these public resources are protected for us, for our children, and for our grandchildren._ **That 's why I am so proud to have been endorsed by t****he Sierra Club, ****a champion in protecting communities, wild places, and the planet itself. ** I pledge to work in the State Senate for policies that benefit everyone in this state, and don't sacrifice our health for the for the profits of a few. If you believe we must take meaningful steps to combat climate change and protect our planet, please donate $15 to my campaign today, and explore the ways you can support [your local chapter.](https://act.myngp.com/el/OlAr2E8Ez-elBrtjVDGk029OBJkwkvImJh30MWwigrk=/g97RKizAA4EZOliYVqUgAXNn-zzLaQuSi6G33gTu6gI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OlAr2E8Ez-elBrtjVDGk029OBJkwkvImJh30MWwigrk=/SpyhRRrKvu6FDiHW4OQSTS6XLZzMug8Nnjm_3aORRGM=?refcode=sierraclub&amount=15) Thank you,

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: TN Legislative Session Resumes with Slate of Hate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
After a fumbled response to COVID-19, Republicans continue to fail to lead. | | | |
---|---
Dear Peter, Democrats want to work with Republicans to do the right thing - to save Tennessee lives and ensure the health and safety of everyone who lives and works in this beautiful state. And as the state legislature heads back into session next week, it's clear that all Republicans want to do is ram through their extremist agenda. Republicans can't be trusted to do their job anymore. As unemployment in the state surpasses 500,000, deaths from COVID 19 are on the rise, and the safety-net crumbles into a mess of hours spent waiting on the phone and missing checks, their plan when the state legislature goes back into session next week will be to continue their march to reduce pour liberties, [dismantle public education](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588006/199450371/-1379550911?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI4NDA1OS0zZDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XvY2KjLkiMQHjbu_KvjR556nGv45KYoIom0E3xKAR8=&emci=b3003655-949b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=16284059-3d9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6362892), and increasing access to permit-less guns. It's also clear Republicans can't be trusted to do what's right anymore. Expanding access to absentee voting is a bi-partisan no brainer. The Secretary of State in Michigan as well as Republican Secretaries of State in Iowa, Georgia, Nebraska and West Virginia are sending all registered voters applications for absentee ballots. They know that in this public health crisis they must do everything they can to protect the health and safety of voters and poll workers. But rather than working with Democrats to change the law and expand access to absentee voting, Tennessee Republicans have to be sued to do the right thing. Next week, Democrats will once again try to do the job they were sent to Nashville to do:
* Ensure medical treatment for people who don’t have health insurance
* Protect lives in the wake of the COVID 19 Pandemic
* Provide necessary relief for the over 500,000 unemployed
* Expand access to absentee ballots to keep you safe when you vote

In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." -_ TNDP chair, Mary Mancini The above is from a letter from DNC state party chairs urging election commissions and governments to adopt legislation to expand voter health and safety. # JAY CLARK

Each week we sit down with Democratic candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.
* * *
# TNDP TRAINING HUB
We have the opportunity in 2020 to present ourselves and our candidates to voters who are looking for an alternative to the corrupt and inept Republican Party.

Digital organizing and digital voter engagement is more crucial than ever during this crisis and we must operate as if it will not be completely over by August or November. That's why we created a [**the TNDP Training Hub to serve as your one stop shop for trainings and skill building. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588017/199450382/262544740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI4NDA1OS0zZDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XvY2KjLkiMQHjbu_KvjR556nGv45KYoIom0E3xKAR8=&emci=b3003655-949b-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=16284059-3d9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=6362892) The TNDP Hub provides county parties, candidates, and campaigns a list of training opportunities from the TNDP, DNC, National Democratic Training Committee (NDTC) and other orgs that covers digital organizing, campaign planning, communications, field & volunteer recruitment, fundraising, and training the trainer.
* * *
# NO TIME LIKE THE PRESENT:
# FILL OUT THE US CENSUS
It's a census year, and with more time at home there is ZERO EXCUSE for you to not fill it out. A few quick facts on the importance of the census:
* Congresses uses the data to determine how many Representatives a state gets.
* The federal government uses census numbers to allocate more than $675 billion in federal funds annually for community programs and services, such as education programs, housing and community development, health care services for the elderly and job training.
* State, local and tribal governments use census information for planning and allocating funds for new school construction, libraries, highway safety and public transportation systems, new roads and bridges, location of police and fire departments and many other projects.
* Many 911 emergency systems are based on maps developed for the last census.

[**Fill out the census now! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588018/199450383/-557522054?fbclid=IwAR0Wk8qLRo3AVtfswqkUlz4fllDGge4Qy5JgBsbtnPaQQ8dGZZK_fK5ra4Y&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6300233&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI4NDA1OS0zZDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XvY2KjLkiMQHjbu_KvjR556nGv45KYoIom0E3xKAR8=)

# IF YOU DON'T KNOW, NOW YOU KNOW:
# A TNDP PODCAST
This year we head to the ballot box, both locally and nationally. It feels weird to say that given the current state of our country and world, but, elections now are crucial to our economy and health. Use some of your time at home to catch up on some of the biggest stories in Tennessee's legislature. If You Don’t Know, Now You Know: A TNDP Podcast is hosted by Tennessee Democratic Party Chair, Mary Mancini. Recorded live from the Tennessee state capitol in Nashville, we speak with lawmakers, activists, and candidates, people who can tell you – and show you – how the laws are made that affect our lives. There’s no shortage of issues to be covered – about freedom, opportunity, equity, justice, and safety.
[**Listen now! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588019/199450384/-6674242?emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6300233&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI4NDA1OS0zZDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XvY2KjLkiMQHjbu_KvjR556nGv45KYoIom0E3xKAR8=)

Before they were elected though, they had to be recruited and trained through the Democratic Party. Any contribution you give today, will help us strengthen our pipeline of candidates and ensure we have effective campaigns running. **[Will you consider donating today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588020/199450385/359870512?emci=b02d41f8-b86a-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI4NDA1OS0zZDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XvY2KjLkiMQHjbu_KvjR556nGv45KYoIom0E3xKAR8=)**

And as the state legislature heads back into session next week, it's clear that all Republicans want to do is ram through their extremist agenda. Republicans can't be trusted to do their job anymore. As unemployment in the state surpasses 500,000, deaths from COVID 19 are on the rise, and the safety-net crumbles into a mess of hours spent waiting on the phone and missing checks, their plan when the state legislature goes back into session next week will be to continue their march to reduce pour liberties, , and increasing access to permit-less guns. It's also clear Republicans can't be trusted to do what's right anymore. Expanding access to absentee voting is a bi-partisan no brainer. The Secretary of State in Michigan as well as Republican Secretaries of State in Iowa, Georgia, Nebraska and West Virginia are sending all registered voters applications for absentee ballots. They know that in this public health crisis they must do everything they can to protect the health and safety of voters and poll workers. | |
---
Main Street Relief Fund -- Small Business Grants
Jeb Bradley May 18th, 2020 Late last week Governor Sununu approved funding for various entities throughout New Hampshire including health care providers, non-profits, a small business relief fund, colleges, and food banks. The funding announced was $595 million which is on top of nearly $250 million already allocated by the Governor. This funding comes from the CARES ACT which was passed by Congress and signed by President Trump in late March and can be used for Covid-19 related expenses by the state as well as cities and towns. These federal funds cannot be used to cover expected state or local revenue shortfalls however.

New Hampshire received $1.25 billion in CARES funding that Governor Sununu is authorized to allocate for Covid-19 related purposes. He had previously allocated $250 of this funding for hospitals, other health care providers, stipends for front-line long-term care workers and first responders, and local and county government’s Covid-19 costs.

It should be noted that under the CARES ACT, according to documents provided to me by Senator Shaheen, New Hampshire also received over $350 million of other funding for specific purposes. That includes $7.5 million for Community Development Block Grants, $5.5 million for public health emergency preparedness, $6.8 million for community health centers, $7 million for child care, $165 million for health care providers (hospitals), and $87 million for education. This education funding is largely split between higher education and elementary and secondary schools.

Governor Sununu’s announcement last week allocates additional CARES funding as follows: $50 million for health care providers with 60% of that dedicated to long-term care facilities, $60 million for charitable organizations such as the New Hampshire Charitable Foundation and Community Development Finance Authority, $25 million for child care agencies, $10 million for agriculture, $5 million for the New Hampshire Food Bank, $10 million for the University of New Hampshire and $5 million for the Community College System.

The largest expenditure announced by Governor Sununu is a $400 million Main Street Relief Fund (MSRF) consisting of grants to businesses. Given the limitations of the federal Payroll Protection Program including the requirement that closed businesses must hire workers back by June 30thand must use 75% of the funding on payroll, Governor Sununu’s MSRF initiative is critical to filling the gaps of Payroll Protection.

The MSRF is intended to help small businesses in the short run stay solvent and re-open. Businesses that wish to avail themselves of this funding must utilize a two-step process.

Step 1: By May 29tha business must file a pre-application form which can be found here: [https://www.goferr.nh.gov/](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI2NzQ1MTM2MzM4OTY2MzMzJmM9czJvMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTA2NzA3OTAmZD14M2EzZDFl.vvFbMmxc3GipcbwXdiBZN_dNZyPeefDLjEjl-c87Xmk). Please look for the blue box on the home page and follow the link for the prequalification application. This application is short and requires information such as the type of business, 2019 tax year gross receipts, anticipated 2020 receipts, compensation and wages paid in 2019, and any other federal grants received.

The principal place of business for applying for the MSRF must be in New Hampshire. Revenue of the business cannot exceed $20 million in 2019. Agriculture, healthcare and childcare business should not apply for the MSRF as these entities are receiving funding through other CARES related sources. Not-for-profit organizations are also not eligible.

It is critical to note that the pre-application form must be filed by May 29th. This is in order to make sure that funding reaches businesses as quickly as possible to curtail the harmful impact of Covid-19 related shut downs.

When pre-applications have been submitted, the Governor’s Office for Emergency Relief and Recovery (GOFERR) will determine final funding criteria to be announced on June 1.

Step 2: When the final funding criteria are announced, businesses will have until June 8thto file a formal application. Release of these funds is anticipated to occur on June 15th.

It should be noted again that this is grant funding not loans. According to the documents released by GOFERR this funding will not be allocated based on first come first serve but rather on the needs of the business. Nevertheless, the pre-application must be submitted by May 29thand the final application by June 8th.

When the $595 million is fully allocated, approximately $400 million will still remain in the New Hampshire CARES fund. I will continue to advocate that some of these funds be allocated to backfill the New Hampshire Unemployment Trust Fund so that businesses struggling to survive are not hit with a large cost increase. I will also continue to advocate that some funding be utilized to enhance public-private partnerships for rural broadband deployment which has become ever more critical.

The weather is improving and businesses are re-opening. It was encouraging to see many stores open with social distancing criteria in place. Take-out ice cream was very popular. Local restaurants are providing takeout and preparing for limited outdoor seating.

The re-opening task force appointed by Governor Sununu continues to meet and hopefully many more businesses can more fully re-open quickly and safely. The outpouring of support for people who have faithfully provided services throughout the Covid-19 pandemic is heartwarming. But we have also realized that every job is essential.

For the re-opening to continue we all have a critical role to play: utilize the 6-foot guideline, practice good hygiene, and when in public places especially indoors use face coverings. Those simple guidelines will better produce a safe and successful re-opening.

Please keep safe and healthy and if you have any questions or concerns, don’t hesitate to contact me at 387-2365.
---

|

| |
---
| Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman

NH 03301 United States

name: margaretgood.com
subject: for the 17
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Fighting on behalf of those killed that day, and on behalf of those who’ve died because of everyday gun violence in our communities, is part of Margaret's mission. It’s what she has done in the Florida House and what she will continue to do in Congress. That's why we're proud to announce that Margaret has been recognized as a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588862/199469721/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=&emci=a9c512a1-3f9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=db08fd73-449c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Team,

Margaret was sworn into office on February 14, 2018, moments before the Marjory Stoneman Douglas shooting in Parkland, and on that day, gun violence became a part of her story in a real and personal way.

The very first time Margaret stood up on the House floor was to introduce an amendment to the Marjory Stoneman Douglas Public Safety Act to require background checks for all gun purchases in the state because she knows the lack of common sense gun policy has cost too many lives.

Fighting on behalf of those killed that day, and on behalf of those who’ve died because of everyday gun violence in our communities, is part of Margaret's mission. It’s what she has done in the Florida House and what she will continue to do in Congress. That's why we're proud to announce that **Margaret has been recognized as a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate.**

**[Moms Demand Action knows Margaret is the type of leader we desperately need in Congress. Now, we need your help to continue to help spread the word about our campaign and Margaret’s work. Can you share the latest news on social?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588863/199469722/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FMargaretGoodFL%2Fphotos%2Fa.1951062028271971%2F3414692088575617&src=sdkpreparse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=&emci=a9c512a1-3f9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=db08fd73-449c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588864/199469723/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FMargaretGoodFL%2Fphotos%2Fa.1951062028271971%2F3414692088575617&src=sdkpreparse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=&emci=a9c512a1-3f9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=db08fd73-449c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) She knows that states that require background checks have fewer instances of gun-related violence AND that overwhelmingly, Floridians support this policy.

Margaret has made it her responsibility as a legislator to represent the interests of our constituents and to do what is in the best interests of the people of our state. She knows it's past time that we enact common-sense gun legislation that will protect citizens at school, work, houses of worship, and in their own homes.

**[Help Margaret shine light on this issue by sharing the news that you stand with her as a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588865/199469724/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FMargaretGoodFL%2Fphotos%2Fa.1951062028271971%2F3414692088575617&src=sdkpreparse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=&emci=a9c512a1-3f9c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=db08fd73-449c-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

Every day, more than 100 Americans are killed by gun violence. Gun violence rates in America are hundreds of times higher than in other industrialized countries — and it’s time we change that.

We can put a stop to the nearly 38,000 gun deaths that happen every year.

Curbing gun violence is a matter of will — and that will is building.

Thank you for joining us in this fight,

Team Good | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588866/199469725/788213855?refcode=em05222020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17588867/199469726/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjA4ZmQ3My00NDljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MFcEopk6ew628cEvLbNyKtPngrsAUk96qTvcXhBfK_k=)**

name: NH Beer Caucus
subject: You're invited to the Third Beer Caucus Happy Hour!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
body:
| |
---
Derek,
First we want to thank those who attended the last two Happy Hour discussions with RNC committeeman Chris Ager, and Sen Chuck Morse and NH House Republican leader Rep Dick Hinch.
Our third Beer Caucus Virtual Happy Hour features two extremely capable and highly competent individuals with interesting backgrounds, NH GOP US Senate Candidates, Corky Messner and Gen. Don Bolduc.
During this Virtual Happy Hour, while sipping your favor libations be it alcoholic or not, we will have a conversation with the candidates, touching on topics such as their professional / military careers, current events, a current events trivia section, and a fun lightning round.
As always, during the meeting you can drop your questions into the chat in real time, and as time / discussion allows, we will try to work them into the discussion.
We hope to see you there on May 27th at 8:00pm. Stay turned, we already have #4 lined up and will announce at end of this Happy Hour.
When: May 27, 2020 08:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)
Register in advance for this meeting: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwkc-uvqD8iE91H2nhzmVP3QCQ-DFTmB_tH](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI2NzU0NjkwODcxMjAzNjIxJmM9ajl2OSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTA2NzU1NTImZD10M3Q5bDNr.8rbabeJ4xAiX7hOzHRKMGCBKfeOriDGBYpm0uFiR0s8)
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.
**Please do not share the confirmation email with others, but feel free to forward and share this email to like minded citizens who would be interested in attending.**
Sincerely,
Rep Tim Lang - (R-Sanbornton) cell [603-566-9802](tel:603-566-9802) for any questions.
Rep Reed Panasiti - (R - Amherst)
Rep Howard Pearl - (R - Loudon)
Hon Michael Moffett - (R- Loudon)

**
****Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee** 10 Water Street, Concord
New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

Our third Beer Caucus Virtual Happy Hour features two extremely capable and highly competent individuals with interesting backgrounds, NH GOP US Senate Candidates, Corky Messner and Gen. Don Bolduc. During this Virtual Happy Hour, while sipping your favor libations be it alcoholic or not, we will have a conversation with the candidates, touching on topics such as their professional / military careers, current events, a current events trivia section, and a fun lightning round. As always, during the meeting you can drop your questions into the chat in real time, and as time / discussion allows, we will try to work them into the discussion. We hope to see you there on May 27th at 8:00pm. Stay turned, we already have #4 lined up and will announce at end of this Happy Hour. When: May 27, 2020 08:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada) Register in advance for this meeting: After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting. Please do not share the confirmation email with others, but feel free to forward and share this email to like minded citizens who would be interested in attending. Sincerely, Rep Tim Lang - (R-Sanbornton) cell tel:603-566-9802 for any questions. Rep Reed Panasiti - (R - Amherst) Rep Howard Pearl - (R - Loudon) Hon Michael Moffett - (R- Loudon) Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street, Concord New Hampshire 03301 United States You received this email because you signed up on our website or made a purchase from us.

body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/7e84c8790ff6a0b2/b642d7f748b26b9cc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, We recently closed out our 2020 Voter Issue Poll, and we’ve tallied the results. _THANK YOU again to everyone who took time to respond!_ Coach has reviewed these results, and wanted us to share them with you today. Here’s the full summary: **What do you think should be Congress's top priority?** 37% Combating coronavirus
18% Economic stimulus
10% Finishing the wall
6% Removing red tape
7% Sanctions against China
11% Defend the life of the unborn
7% Protecting 2nd Amendment rights
4% Other **What do you think should be Congress's second priority?** 13% Combating coronavirus
35% Economic stimulus
14% Finishing the wall
4% Removing red tape
9% Sanctions against China
10% Defend the life of the unborn
13% Protecting 2nd Amendment rights
3% Other **Do you think President Trump will win re-election in 2020?** 95% Yes
3% No
2% Unsure **What are Republicans’ chances of defeating Doug Jones in Alabama?** 79% Very likely
11% Likely
3% Toss up
0% Unlikely
0% Very unlikely
6% Unsure All of the issues listed above are important, of course.

And to move our nation forward, we must re-elect President Trump and DEFEAT liberal Doug Jones this November!

Coach is running for this key U.S. Senate seat to get the job done in this race and deliver RESULTS in Washington... and your sustaining support is crucial right now. We remain locked in a tight primary runoff, now rescheduled for July 14th, and we know that Doug Jones is sitting on a massive war chest of special interest campaign cash.

name: Bill Olson
subject: STOP Pelosi's Socialist Wish List! 😬👎
disclaimer_text: paid for by borrowing from other countries, mostly China!_
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)
---
Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.**

You might have heard recently about the pork-laden Socialist wish list that Pelosi's Democrats passed last week.

_We should all be able to agree that as a country, the United States of America spends billions of dollars every year that it doesn’t have. At this point our national debt is in the neighborhood of $23 trillion. Any additional stimulus program that is instituted has to be paid for by borrowing from other countries, mostly China!_

__So, before we get farther in debt we better be darn sure that the money borrowed and spent is absolutely essential.__

The bill allocates about $1 trillion to state, local and tribal governments. Unfortunately, though the Democrats are selling this as a stimulus targeting first responders and medical personnel (which I wholeheartedly support), they conveniently gloss over the fact that **they want to bail out state and local governments in blue states for mismanagement that has happened decades before the coronavirus ever existed.**

For example, take a state like California. It has decided on its own to become a “sanctuary state“. Sure, questionable legality but let’s put that aside.

The influx of more and more illegal immigrants, and California’s increasing responsibility to feed, clothe, educate, and provide health care, to said illegal immigrants, _has bloated the state government debt by billions of dollars_.

They couldn’t pay this debt even before there was a coronavirus. **The Pelosi/Soto Bill uses tax dollars from around the country in order to bail out California’s unwise policies.**

Pelosi and Soto seem to have neglected that fact.

This Bill also expands the eligibility of the cash payment stimulus of $1200 per person, to _include undocumented workers inside the United States illegally_. It should be our government’s goal **to reduce the amount of illegal immigrants in the United States, not give motivation to stay here illegally**.

Instead, this bill includes an entire section on immigration, _**including an amnesty for illegal-alien workers who are currently performing "essential critical infrastructure work."**_

We have 20+ million Americans out of work right now, why would we make it easier for illegal aliens to retain/obtain employment? Madness!

Also included in the HEROES Act are provisions that would:

_* Automatically extend visas for nonimmigrants who are not able to file for an extension due to the Covid-19._

_* Issue green cards to foreign health care workers in the United States who are eligible to receive a green card but are subject to annual renewals. Again, thousands of American citizens in the healthcare field are being laid off or fired.**Why would we bring in even a single foreign healthcare worker?** Madness!_

_* Require ICE to release all illegal-alien detainees who are not subject to mandatory detention and to provide those who are in detention with phones, internet access, hand sanitizer and other personal hygiene products.- Catch and release, by another name.
Tell me again what this has to do with COVID-19?_

_***Overturns state laws that require voters produce identification in order to vote. What happened to the 10th Amendment?**_

_*It expands unemployment in such a way that it is advantageous to collect unemployment for at least the next year._

_*It has hundreds of billions of dollars of support for state and local governments, in many cases more money than they were asking for._

The bill was drafted by only Democrats. There was not one single open hearing, not one.
This is the most expensive bill in the history of the United States.

We are in Central Florida have had enough of Congressman Darren Soto‘s liberal borderline socialist ideas. _Listen, he may be the nicest guy in the world, but he just doesn’t vote RIGHT!_

It’s time for commonsense conservative representation to take over and restore the Central Florida ￼values we share here in the ninth district.

[__**It’s time for Soto to go!**__](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)

**Look, I'****m a career soldier- not a career politician. But I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens! I have been fighting for America my whole adult life.**

Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time!

Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - _he sold his voting card to her a long time ago!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)
---

**I say, ENOUGH! This man has done nothing to look out for the American People, and all the Dems do is obstruct and call names!**

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

_Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto._

If so, then [I need your help to replace him!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

[Can you help me meet my goal for the month?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I remain $7400 short of my monthly goal- and I can use your assistance to get there!

**The Democrats are going to lose this year **\- with your help!

_Let's get this done!_
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)
---
Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)
---
P.S. [I really need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q), so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP! ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hnkLfOtzq_6OuRU&b=ysnfw0ilQCr.iC2pMTr3.Q)Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rCwsHCwcjLTsLAzMDEzMrLRGtCxsrMwMTEws) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rCwsHCwcjLTsLAzMDEzMrLRGtCxsrMwMTEws)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Never expected this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats only need FOUR seats to take the Senate, and they have the financial advantage with less than 6 months until Election Day. The End of Month deadline is days away, and I need you to join this fight and stop a liberal takeover. Contribute now and your gift will be 5X MATCHED >>>

Friend,

We knew in 2020 Democrats would do everything they could to take back the White House and Senate, but we NEVER expected this.
* Democrats are outraising Republican incumbents by huge margins - sometimes doubling or even almost **TRIPLING** Republicans' totals.
* In red states, Democrats are rising in the polls and bringing in millions.
* Joe Biden just launched a $100 million ad blitz in must-win states.

This is worst case scenario. Texas is becoming one of the nation's biggest battleground states, and a huge number of Texans are undecided going into the general election. Nancy Pelosi thinks Orange County is hers for the keeping, Friend. Last election, she flooded this district with $10,000,000.00 to flip it blue and now she's ready to spend even more if it means keeping her majority.

[**Can you rush in a contribution of any size to show Nancy Pelosi we 've had enough of the Left's socialist agenda?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NnQKy48pl0075tIQ2rS2CloTj1CGxufDDyBuH_hHlNxO5Kuh_EfMNY1JNDzS8N3qCkF1yx9HnHXKrmaBayTlBoNPwM5DqIk9fQvAXtCGcLPWZNna9pDLBU1ghWO9GG5Th1qXMUJG3wRXxx03q8upPuA9PS8cU1kbtJsQVSU1q07N9D_ur0FWaCnQQ8LIvtPH2Xh0Z1c9IonPIOwaDwlmEos_Al7BCL6ZBWlSjTCrAjr7Jz6RV--f3CJfs1tCqc38VuYT9erGxL2IAqJdMnxnSf-qsIrolVz6vdCiFF-x4oA1kt7ZOBYda657wiVCYOMliISUPSCPU64RR0pJi-KbrWPJOwfY9c2fDMM0bTt4BrovjjYt3-ovVYdl6WrMkYCE62cbCeiHEZ4HnYcDDRNIYg==&c=3CosLf-iLvxz6CXdW0h0_gMsE1EJSIuLISaAP2viiIM661kxhxvQqg==&ch=EOsMa7bbvIdusI0y5gBY_30aQVNO8sLgdGkK2cI0_dep36yZimfkcQ==)

Young Kim is an immigrant and life-long conservative fighting for lower taxes, fewer regulations, affordable healthcare, and a pro-business environment. She's been a leader on the issues of affordability and homelessness -- the issues Californians face everyday.

_That means lower taxes and fewer taxes leaving more of your paycheck in your wallet.
That means getting rid of red tape that is burdening small businesses and allowing them to thrive.
That means building a better, brighter future for California, providing hardworking Americans with more opportunity._

**But our ability to do all ^ that ^ relies on the support of grassroots supporters, like you, chipping in what you can to get us to the finish line.**

We need to return conservative leaders, like Young Kim, to Congress who will fight for our conservative values and common-sense Californians.

Taking on our self-funded millionaire opponent is going to be tough. But we didn't get back into this fight because we thought it would be easy.

With the House Majority on the line, this fight is too important to sit out. [**Chip in HERE to take back the House for Republicans.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NnQKy48pl0075tIQ2rS2CloTj1CGxufDDyBuH_hHlNxO5Kuh_EfMNY1JNDzS8N3qCkF1yx9HnHXKrmaBayTlBoNPwM5DqIk9fQvAXtCGcLPWZNna9pDLBU1ghWO9GG5Th1qXMUJG3wRXxx03q8upPuA9PS8cU1kbtJsQVSU1q07N9D_ur0FWaCnQQ8LIvtPH2Xh0Z1c9IonPIOwaDwlmEos_Al7BCL6ZBWlSjTCrAjr7Jz6RV--f3CJfs1tCqc38VuYT9erGxL2IAqJdMnxnSf-qsIrolVz6vdCiFF-x4oA1kt7ZOBYda657wiVCYOMliISUPSCPU64RR0pJi-KbrWPJOwfY9c2fDMM0bTt4BrovjjYt3-ovVYdl6WrMkYCE62cbCeiHEZ4HnYcDDRNIYg==&c=3CosLf-iLvxz6CXdW0h0_gMsE1EJSIuLISaAP2viiIM661kxhxvQqg==&ch=EOsMa7bbvIdusI0y5gBY_30aQVNO8sLgdGkK2cI0_dep36yZimfkcQ==)

Thank you,

Taylor

subject: Low Stock Alert: only 25 Drain the Swamp License Plate Covers left

body:

name: Martha McSally
subject: China is out of control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
I learned early on in my military service to NEVER trust a Communist. Because I have been vocal in demanding their communist regime be held accountable, China is threatening me in hopes I'll back down. They're out of luck.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HZqiqrnpBxIljM_b9tEmJTAOEboEQB0e6EXKXYfVlebWMh4qkgpdKP7-jDa4-euuvkapBjtnYFCHfADpEQuSogRQjtLuqcoLSz1-7OneoLe5UaOCMPylsgSwAaOt0OfCrtaOM_wZ0t5RlxgmbSq1r1z6EqGMxQcnz4ad5xLnvGSKIcKQmZv1jg4KYUwYzNJTmJEgVuNvbt-gQ6Pg_D-59tmCaA3WL_KW8n_FCpQIVWUV-dmaFRZkbXHMmXduFPi_sof-1uEcEFDcnqJsuwXZeNF_10YU08b8aW3B7O2kYTpMmRGwS6LeN6-PzUl5YAELzeYHhiL_kx_2R_wzWyEBhJbJkbNHtupyppFmul3o9JEaiowCQ50fCJO9W6hR3jEBdbfWo47C37eiKJNfBgJWVYl4fHPkd1p0wvUe613Mbrk=&c=XTlzZwxCrGRTgcqjF3K8WFr2d2prn-HIGEyjsVnaM_T5CrqIIyuWqw==&ch=ovV8EdcZwfjcUklxpDftLNqCQ-tzKQoCB-lvuTOPNPXYkfHXWeYwBQ==)
Friend,

This is totally unacceptable. While the Chinese Communist Party covered up its responsibility in the coronavirus crisis, a Chinese company invested in my opponent Mark Kelly's venture. China is hoping my opponent wins big in November so they have a loyal friend in the Senate.

**Arizonans and Americans deserve so much better.**

YOU deserve a leader who will put America First and stand up to China's Communist Regime - not friends of the Chinese government like Mark Kelly and Joe Biden. [**Pitch in NOW to support my fight and we can hold China accountable! >>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HZqiqrnpBxIljM_b9tEmJTAOEboEQB0e6EXKXYfVlebWMh4qkgpdKP7-jDa4-euuv1htLauMI-33IcqhwaW17C7ZrkRdYYwgRgdx-fuuLbnnAgwfp_Dlqx0ZEKZpsISXDQLUWEACwUeWt0mDgicdqDO_CNJtCD7p9Q8Muncer8VclrITzbXd_BhpV3028aQH8Dd7CAAyrecenB-moBtDWad6oHcPR-N-e5cnDZH8xN2h_SwnaePfrip9bKI1TjYQsNsFCJBSqKzROAY1OnIvACSQv1jDEvd7xDP3kiCMcpgeFfI1sMFAnM0_Xr5O_yISKF1pLkAquAK20OOJu-luVG0ksflbshsHx4-lz_Py38CjbE69bsROaOA-YYwiFB9-UUgCI_11GinozP6hZx9hDV9OryA-9j2AmMj3moPrIIQ=&c=XTlzZwxCrGRTgcqjF3K8WFr2d2prn-HIGEyjsVnaM_T5CrqIIyuWqw==&ch=ovV8EdcZwfjcUklxpDftLNqCQ-tzKQoCB-lvuTOPNPXYkfHXWeYwBQ==)

China has tried for years to destabilize our economy, and now their coverup is to blame for the deaths of tens of thousands of Americans. I have introduced legislation to implement targeted sanctions against Chinese communist leaders. While I've fighting to protect our country, my opponent was going into and profiting off the Communist Regime.

I've said it before, but I'll say it again - NEVER trust a Communist.

There is a lot of work to be done to make things right. But we can't do it if we lose Arizona's Senate seat and our Republican Senate Majority. [**Donate now and stand with me so I can continue my fight to hold China 's Communist Party accountable!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HZqiqrnpBxIljM_b9tEmJTAOEboEQB0e6EXKXYfVlebWMh4qkgpdKP7-jDa4-euuas0J3yJuQYUfp9OLpsWFOyNF11qrW0s_dx_alRQ3kTPbMz1wP8ZISs6mwGe_zGX-7jpv7BYjfEFe1vX2lohlxD5YdvwLISrZjWMECCbM42RWG53ZpgNXP4GlKjJpVVF8vV2cIxjhW6e-es6KKHwF_eXN4OmOFWpB7Y0S-_TxLz8KKus8yZcEdtv2Iqlgj8deg1Kqjq790DdMkqfc3pAXnwPZOEUpNeaBOQe_0SLHv9E7Dc5AfR8op4jLv3sxLsbObOlfHPBONKQmFOiyZT_HQmbJvNBROZBDl4rH958QbWj4QhWqHFISdv9zNq7fTeK6oh9WgVuH9LBNAwyaL9Jjfs1SHVy42xWiqLewhpuiqcQ=&c=XTlzZwxCrGRTgcqjF3K8WFr2d2prn-HIGEyjsVnaM_T5CrqIIyuWqw==&ch=ovV8EdcZwfjcUklxpDftLNqCQ-tzKQoCB-lvuTOPNPXYkfHXWeYwBQ==)

clean_body: I learned early on in my military service to NEVER trust a Communist. Because I have been vocal in demanding their communist regime be held accountable, China is threatening me in hopes I'll back down. They're out of luck. == Friend, This is totally unacceptable. While the Chinese Communist Party covered up its responsibility in the coronavirus crisis, a Chinese company invested in my opponent Mark Kelly's venture. China is hoping my opponent wins big in November so they have a loyal friend in the Senate. Arizonans and Americans deserve so much better. YOU deserve a leader who will put America First and stand up to China's Communist Regime - not friends of the Chinese government like Mark Kelly and Joe Biden. == China has tried for years to destabilize our economy, and now their coverup is to blame for the deaths of tens of thousands of Americans. I have introduced legislation to implement targeted sanctions against Chinese communist leaders. While I've fighting to protect our country, my opponent was going into and profiting off the Communist Regime. I've said it before, but I'll say it again - NEVER trust a Communist. There is a lot of work to be done to make things right. But we can't do it if we lose Arizona's Senate seat and our Republican Senate Majority. == In Service, == Martha McSally == P.S.== , and we'll send you a SIGNED copy of my new book, "Dare to Fly"! It's a story of practical life lessons to overcome obstacles, defeat fear, and thrive to meet your full potential. I hope you enjoy! == All purchases of the book by McSally for Senate Inc. are royalty-excluded. Martha McSally does not profit from the sale of these books. name: Rita Hart
subject: [survey] I want to know what the headlines don’t reveal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-hRKKAQ4z3Pi3ryjGOZL6EW0wZx-RQysLBzCXy2VGc=/3gLdiBpeHyTz4S57La_YUglU9rXjCyt_AogDI_PMd5E=) Right now, Congress is deliberating about the next round of coronavirus relief for the American people. I know outside forces and partisan grandstanding will try to get in between the American people and the economic and health care relief they need. That's why I'm dedicated to listening to the people most directly affected by the pandemic -- this is what leaders need to do: listen. **[I want to know: How has the coronavirus pandemic affected you and your family? Take just one minute to fill out this survey.](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-hRKKAQ4z3Pi3ryjGOZL6EW0wZx-RQysLBzCXy2VGc=/3gLdiBpeHyTz4S57La_YUglU9rXjCyt_AogDI_PMd5E=)** | ****[Take my COVID-19 survey](https://act.myngp.com/el/O-hRKKAQ4z3Pi3ryjGOZL6EW0wZx-RQysLBzCXy2VGc=/3gLdiBpeHyTz4S57La_YUglU9rXjCyt_AogDI_PMd5E=)****

It's so important that we understand the extent of the damage this virus has done to our communities as we plan our strategy to repair and bring our communities together, stronger than ever before.
**[I want to know what the headlines and the statistics don't reveal. I want to know how you specifically have been affected by the coronavirus pandemic. Thanks for sharing your stories with me.

Rita Hart

name: Troy Newman
subject: BREAKING: Planned Parenthood final judgement
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==) Dear Friend,
Last fall, a San Francisco jury ruled against me in a rigged lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood, America's largest abortion provider.
**Now, after months of legal arguments, a final judgement has been handed down. I am being held severally liable for a judgement of more than $1.5 MILLION, plus what is expected to be millions more in attorneys fees.**
__**This is a devastating blow to me and to Operation Rescue. But the fight isn't over yet.**__
I have been called by God to fight for the unborn, and I will continue to do just that until my dying breath. It all starts with an appeal of this bogus judgment, which is coming very soon.
Can I count on your support as we continue fighting for justice?
**[Will you please make a much-needed emergency gift before midnight tonight to help us weather this storm and carry the fight into the next phase?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==)** [**Contribute As a founding board member of the Center for Medical Progress, I, along with David Daleiden, Albin Rhomberg, Sandra Merritt, and others, exposed shocking conversations between undercover pro-life journalists and Planned Parenthood executives.
These abortion execs haggled to obtain top dollar for baby body parts specimens in the eyes of Planned Parenthood supplied to middle-man organ procurement companies.
They admitted to altering their procedures to harvest the most profitable parts of an innocent child's body.
_You may even recall that one abortionist stated her intention to purchase a Lamborghini with her earnings from the sale of fetal tissue._
Yet here I am, being saddled with $1.5 million in damages, and MILLIONS more to come in attorneys fees.
**[I will continue to fight back through the legal system and on the ground until Planned Parenthood is held accountable for their illegal sale of aborted babies for profit. Will you help me continue the fight with your gift of $25, $50, $100, or more today?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==)**
Along with my fellow defendants, I'll face a second trial, likely later this year.
This second case, filed by the National Abortion Federation, focuses on preventing the release of additional undercover footage. It's been nearly five years since the initial evidence against the abortion industry was released, and they're fighting tooth and nail to prevent the world from seeing further evidence of their horrific wrongdoings.
They know that we're sitting on evidence that could end their reign of terror for good, and they're trying to silence us.
**During my trial in the liberal bastion of California last fall, the nation's largest abortion provider went on the record and did __NOT__ deny that they sell aborted baby body parts for profit. They did __NOT__ deny that our video evidence was authentic.**
But Planned Parenthood wants to make me to pay a heavy price for exposing their disgusting and illegal business practices. They want to make an example of me so that intrepid investigators are too afraid to learn and expose more about the sordid truth of their illegal babies-for-cash scheme.
We can't let that happen. We can't let them conceal their ghoulish work in the shadows and punish those who dare try to shine the light of truth on them!
**[Help us to raise $10,000 by midnight and ensure we have enough resources to fight back against Planned Parenthood, the National Abortion Federation, and the entire abortion lobby.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==)**
I'm not going to just sit back and take this verdict.
I'm going to appeal this case and take the fight all the way to the Supreme Court if I have to I will seek justice for the unborn and for the truth.
**[Please help me in my pursuit for justice against Planned Parenthood with your gift of $25 or more by midnight.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==)**
Thank you, and God bless you.
Troy Newman
President Operation Rescue [**Contribute**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==) [**Contribute Monthly**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jwPEAW1eSH1yhJbCDPrLfyfGaZOA3kUOiu7l6wa3VJkvIDpFLlUvX7AHUVrDn8N4K8yDidM8mkq1SxcehDIs3Ju6swbd5jAbAjSasCffqZS_Hvt9PgK0s-CSnQwBj4IVMKuSkyfy3cEgA6ofXg3m2CcltSkUO5KzNNxaLUS2NJR1iWLh2Eux3Q2_y8-B-8zDAmGrOXcPRT5Fdvg5LW-El2shtDkWBxYM&c=B0zn5SU9WU_TxqHNWLksfC1-PaFr5g9hb6ssovsJZvnBZnkUC2JwmQ==&ch=A70DQINBvCUT0wcGGIXOQ3qpomfIBxGDW_ixk-bP_sibz7SbywUkvA==)

clean_body: == Dear Friend, Last fall, a San Francisco jury ruled against me in a rigged lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood, America's largest abortion provider. Now, after months of legal arguments, a final judgement has been handed down. I am being held severally liable for a judgement of more than $1.5 MILLION, plus what is expected to be millions more in attorneys fees. This is a devastating blow to me and to Operation Rescue. But the fight isn't over yet. I have been called by God to fight for the unborn, and I will continue to do just that until my dying breath. It all starts with an appeal of this bogus judgment, which is coming very soon. Can I count on your support as we continue fighting for justice? == == == == == As a founding board member of the Center for Medical Progress, I, along with David Daleiden, Albin Rhomberg, Sandra Merritt, and others, exposed shocking conversations between undercover pro-life journalists and Planned Parenthood executives. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Michelle is a fighter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Up and down the ballot, amazing Democrats are running for office to ignite real change in their communities and for the country as a whole.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

November is going to be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes.

Up and down the ballot, amazing Democrats are running for office to ignite real change in their communities and for the country as a whole. One of those candidates is **Michelle De La Isla, who's running for Congress in Kansas' 2nd District -- and I’m proud to endorse her.**

If I know one thing about Michelle, it's that she's a fighter. No matter the challenges she faced -- being homeless, surviving domestic violence, raising her children as a single mother, or a cancer diagnosis -- Michelle persisted to create a better life for her family.

Now, she's ready to do the same for the people of Kansas, and I'm proud to be on her team.

Michelle has fought for others her entire life. Her selflessness, passion, determination, and bold leadership is what's needed in the House. I know she'll fight every day to lift up the voices of all Kansans and be the representation they deserve.

But Michelle can't get to Congress without the support of a grassroots team. In 2018, Democrats lost this district by less than 1%, and the DCCC named this race a top battleground in 2020. That means Michelle has a real shot at winning, but it's going to be a tough fight.

Michelle believes in running this race the right way. That's why she's not taking any corporate PAC money. Instead, she's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help power her campaign.

**[Will you show Michelle you have her back in this fight? If you can, chip in right now to join me in supporting her in this crucial race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17592804/199536951/-1041774526?gpsid=8_122_13092&refcode=em20_200522_warren_fnd_gq_ful__ew_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200522_warren_fnd_gq_ful__ew_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWVkNzM1Ny01YzljLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V4TCkrLpZNTlsPx6ifLfx0CyCMa3SmGtRIRaBryLPiI=)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**

That means Michelle has a real shot at winning, but it's going to be a tough fight. Michelle believes in running this race the right way. That's why she's not taking any corporate PAC money. Instead, she's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help power her campaign. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
