Right now, our campaign is working to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November.

And it's all thanks to grassroots donors.

Now, we're working every day to lay the groundwork for the general election, and we're just over halfway to the next FEC deadline.

**[What happens between now and November is powerfully important-- and every dollar counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help power our work to elect Democrats like Elizabeth?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525722/45c30650/1cb2c9509/66e92beb/1514113088/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjA5Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA1MjJfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR09F_EGR_GRM_D_20200522_V1S2_P")**

We're not going to beat Donald Trump and down-ballot Republicans by backing down -- we'll beat them by fighting back.

We fight back when we build a grassroots movement -- a movement that doesn't take money from fossil fuel giants, big banks, or Big Pharma.

We fight back when we call out corruption in Washington and elect Democrats to advocate for the biggest set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate.

We're asking for your help today to keep powering this fight. With your help, we can get back on track to meet our fundraising goal and keep growing this grassroots movement.

**[If you can during this time, please make a contribution today-- we'd be deeply grateful.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525722/45c30650/1cb2c9509/66e92beb/1514113088/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjA5Rl9FR1JfR1JNX0RfMjAyMDA1MjJfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR09F_EGR_GRM_D_20200522_V1S2_P")**

Thanks,

Warren Democrats

body:
Patriot,

As if once wasn't enough, we just learned that Congressman Watkins has purchased a second round of taxpayer-funded advertising during the congressional blackout period, and we've decided he is clearly not getting the message that Kansans don't want him selfishly spending their hard-earned tax dollars on political ads posed as public service announcements.

Sign the petition to stop Steve Watkins' taxpayer-funded campaign ads! (https://www.jakelaturner.com/watkins-taxpayer-funded-ads-petition)
http://It is shameful that Watkins has already taken advantage of a Nancy Pelosi-sanctioned loophole allowing him to use taxpayer money on extra advertising time during the congressional blackout period to give himself a hearty pat on the back at the expense of the Americans on the front line fighting this pandemic. But to double down on unnecessary, irresponsible government spending with another round of ads? Enough is enough. As highlighted in the recent Topeka Capital Journal article, these ads are an exploitation of clear guidelines that federally funded advertising should cease after May 6th in an election year. This is a blatant disregard for the appropriate use of taxpayer funds. Join us in demanding that Steve Watkins immediately remove these ads and pay back the funds he has stolen from taxpayers to promote himself at their expense.
It is shameful that Watkins is exploiting a Nancy Pelosi-sanctioned loophole allowing him to use YOUR money on self-promoting ads during the congressional blackout period. That money was intended to provide messages that protect the health and safety of our seniors and first responders, but Watkins felt it would be better used to run political ads about himself. Enough is enough.

As highlighted in the recent T (https://www.cjonline.com/news/20200519/rep-steve-watkins-relying-on-relaxed-franking-rules-to-charge-taxpayers-for-stealth-political-adsrsquo) opeka Capital Journal article (https://www.cjonline.com/news/20200519/rep-steve-watkins-relying-on-relaxed-franking-rules-to-charge-taxpayers-for-stealth-political-adsrsquo) , these ads are an exploitation of clear guidelines that federally funded advertising should cease after May 6^th in an election year.

This is a blatant disregard for the appropriate use of taxpayer funds. Join us in demanding that Steve Watkins immediately remove these ads and pay back the funds he has stolen from taxpayers to promote himself at their expense.
Sign the Petition Stop Taxpayer Funded Campaign Ads! (https://www.jakelaturner.com/watkins-taxpayer-funded-ads-petition)
We need a congressman who respects the law and your taxpayer dollars and has a history of fiscally responsible behavior. Jake LaTurner will be a diligent protector of your hard earned money by putting it to work for you where it can do the most good. Help us get Jake elected to Congress so we can send a real, trustworthy conservative to Washington, D.C.
Donate to send a Conservative to Congress! (https://secure.anedot.com/laturner/donate)
Thanks for your support!

Team LaTurner
Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner

============================================================
** https://www.facebook.com/JakeLaTurnerKS/ (https://www.facebook.com/JakeLaTurnerKS/)
** https://twitter.com/JakeLaTurner (https://twitter.com/JakeLaTurner)
** https://www.instagram.com/kansansforlaturner/ (https://www.instagram.com/kansansforlaturner/)
** jakelaturner.com (jakelaturner.com)
Copyright © *2019* *Kansans for LaTurner*, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
P.O. Box 67237
Topeka, KS 66667

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=c5645def74)

name: Christy Smith
subject: We're going to hold Mike Garcia accountable to our district and make sure he has one of the shortest tenures in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

This campaign was never going to be easy -- by November, we'll have gone through three elections in the time in which most candidates just have one.

But I am more motivated than ever to make Mike Garcia one of the shortest-serving representatives in Congress and to flip this seat from red to blue.

**We have from now through November to make a bigger impact -- and I'm counting on having you there alongside me to make this victory happen.**

There's no slowing down between now and our next election -- not while so much is at stake.

**[Chip in $5 or more now to make sure we fight back against Mike Garcia and Donald Trump harder than ever before>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f266b/3172182924/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2664/3172182924/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2665/3172182924/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2666/3172182924/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2667/3172182924/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2660/3172182924/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f266b/3172182924/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full")
Mike Garcia based his campaign on being a constant yes-man to Donald Trump and the special interest groups that funded his campaign coffers.

Now that he's in Washington, we know he'll follow through on his promise -- **and that's why we're going to hold him accountable to our district and make sure he has one of the shortest tenures in Congress.**

**[We can make this happen -- but I need your help. Can you pitch in $5 or anything you can today to make sure we win this November and take back this seat?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f266b/3172182924/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full")**

Thanks so much. I hope you have a safe long weekend.

\-- Christy

[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f266b/3172182924/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MjJfcGl2b3Q1LWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200522_pivot5-full")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|

777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb9c/29776869/9834117/569f2663/3172182924/VEsHBw/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

body:
I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign Friend, here’s a quick update on what my campaign has been up to this week as we try to take back #NY22! **Visiting our Friends at Revere Copper** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjHMrqnv9CxZdlngvpy9UtdjBTIJBIXejwkykTp2ERAIvvZF1ySfmku-J5neDESBLe7t8lr0nHnefg5hm1bZWadEObF8z1nSeSG_OzDpf9106YQ0AHu1HCnlGG7GdqIVqAnt-gbTbB0_Am2zMTtlT-TYWOJ8arEBmWFuhHs72_8qG7mk2OSnJXHzAvJxqtuBQl2QFoavnZj9VOFoxbaYAn9PArrA-OKLNWF1vNMCZ5hitpCVzj-6r2Wi2_afETbFScVCp2G3Q-9_W0GlvLN84xvn1KtZih7O81RfNB1oUIDNmG74PJWImuMcJ0sp9zducUncV5aNv_NTiigwCG6C1iSTd1zOwYIzuKRvxMPdJg7shXxoLmMQcc-VJ4kNrlta72B1JQX3uGJHW5REtRaPiis35UoC2ALMP59pgyYGrZ-HvHORjevMXZGpjtSqvEX6vpu7QGNrYzIZ1dpEDUBiRrQc) Manufacturing plants across the country have shown resilience and resolve in the face of this crisis, and Revere Copper in Rome is no exception. This week I toured their plant to see firsthand the challenges they are facing and how they are overcoming them. Thank you, Revere Copper!

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjHMrqnv9CxZdlngvpy9UtdjBTIJBIXejwkykTp2ERAIvvZF1ySfmku-J5neDESBLe7t8lr0nHnefg5hm1bZWadEObF8z1nSeSG_OzDpf9106YQ0AHu1HCnlGG7GdqIVqAnt-gbTbB0_Am2zMTtlT-TYWOJ8arEBmWFuhHs72_8qG7mk2OSnJXHzAvJxqtuBQl2QFoavnZj9VOFoxbaYAn9PArrA-OKLNWF1vNMCZ5hitpCVzj-6r2Wi2_afETbFScVTpcBrrxsQaAha0jG-9FOU7sEFspwV-htdPKm_C-7pFuJmNH6hQnrHiDt50ARipUvK7Jr6sJaGLJf1NbluaD9Q6YEdB8z0NFT0MWelyJM963iBVqBsGcWirRl6xJ50lsiDTQ_qbHCf5qvWODlur8G6Qp0MWqBuYFqfGNUciEDeSBkxsbn8xFtv1mQ9t7SWwgVWCSsTjdAM8nCEmBmUnGxU)** | |
---
**Watch me Tear apart Pelosi’s HEROES Act - Literally**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjE1TuQTBd-bHdwzVBz2auNgL9TGCrd2F7rliXlFHGoEzeP0nyW4k7vtJSOy16KV1aIczmArRc_Ijs8bPyKreB30GQQAhN2uC5U4Ct2ZGDZxegdR3ZO55YGrOrK7KdRKsz-8ShjLyba7fIdneegKO07gRnMZIED32vRQt85e1I6wgSmiRSwTvTTh9jRiudm12uRjBMxn2Hoo49Xe4lq2YxlBSuVPRIqWUV5OtCgAda9TIbr15SXKURi6mYt1d1v8NcBGqvm8rDgw76byyfzCYRp1yO8bC5bqfcn22CQT77neEuw5cr5Ef-l5KXJFiPG2-MJWgjkAlealVfzFkGHk2SwP6WQrx0jZiAl4CmvfUUu0ir4-Ir3Op8riSJ0AXHPzspTE9veOPLIG4gm2nXJMVYVxxGw0QKAFQCeb3w4x2KHFXg%3D%3D)
Nancy Pelosi’s HEROES Act – backed by Anthony Brindisi – only serves her own liberal interests while leaving America’s real needs on the back-burner. Nancy, we don’t need stimulus checks for illegal immigrants, we need practical solutions to get Americans back to work.

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjE1TuQTBd-bHdwzVBz2auNgL9TGCrd2F7rliXlFHGoEzeP0nyW4k7vtJSOy16KV1aIczmArRc_Ijs8bPyKreB30GQQAhN2uC5U4Ct2ZGDZxegdR3ZO55YGrOrK7KdRKsz-8ShjLyba7fIdneegKO07gRnMZIED32vRQt85e1I6wgSmiRSwTvTTh9jRiudm12uRjBMxn2Hoo49Xe4lq2YxlBHtjDSQMz0WdTS5R1k8C5RNn7onstz2KpHcAA8sjg1DqQiXvTSLoiJUwg-TbEUgH4_fvLVGA-F6kWkYvL3mXGsfmP7Y3K1l6V8x-ABkDQnc_WsuDmDXNF8Q3Vk26U19TDZTaIhcnWQTE0Fv8ht72yTjpTe1ZZ-svUigq0hLI5RSt3hs6DgQ_uiFECHEfDqS0b_h2lLtC_z0Z96DKfFVOrew%3D%3D)**
|
---
**Standing for the Lives of the Unborn**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjHMrqnv9CxZdlngvpy9Utdjdc27bXoyEhHvsSlbNstn_HrF6Tii_17GjVBrXeVPUxVsjA4LAzL3uqtzflELcqH6TGJS3eR9-FO1T-cnALtMW2mLXGP3iniZz1vLBMf_v_MslpJ6rBjngW6uI3z-pqp2JsZT60FWdm-lIr5BJSZzuCQuomSVFdlD1ruQDco8uISuo1QJZ30oNda8DyKGbdrbemTDLNBJ0nEM0T8bTiMLUqFCmqe7sQFcus5DEL4JDcuZkLCiqj0jTaNKX8IscXbCXkVY30w-UxuYvIfW5i6tT3dQid9Mu2btVGYahgXzzls3bCQ7vBjJg9Z0IwlHVPdsoaYiH-FFIRVL6NemrM1uPZ1qcGibf6ZO5cDDkIN9yx4pGU9y2G3fgeVolTYVoTOKmhsKZbs7zN4t-V3TtVWbIQ-AYDYYhr19n7XH4dkFTOwxBnrraVai44Ctc_mljf4vl9zP2y8scN1a4AfJ3FzUOg%3D%3D)
One of the most crucial issues on the ballot this year: protecting the lives of the unborn. I’m proud to be the only candidate in the race with a 100% pro-life record, and I am honored to be endorsed by an organization as amazing as the Susan B. Anthony List.

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=5097765659ca4f35b008ef299747a5f7&_e=_io-p1-EEejy8A8FaXZ5t14J0m1d8pR2qFRZ3pN6TjHMrqnv9CxZdlngvpy9Utdjdc27bXoyEhHvsSlbNstn_HrF6Tii_17GjVBrXeVPUxVsjA4LAzL3uqtzflELcqH6TGJS3eR9-FO1T-cnALtMW2mLXGP3iniZz1vLBMf_v_MslpJ6rBjngW6uI3z-pqp2JsZT60FWdm-lIr5BJSZzuCQuomSVFdlD1ruQDco8uISuo1QJZ30oNda8DyKGbdrbemTDLNBJ0nEM0T8bTiMLUqFCmqe7sQFcus5DEL4JDcuZkLCiqj0jTaNKX8IscXbCjzji6WYMlJ_xUIoFbzDbz5olvBQBpspjjmNfmEifyi5TFX_BualWP9hGU3a6cyej5NcfnD42o-N1ca81xTD3-RUMr2Rdf1pf1s6a4R3AZNtngrTiBeA1gVDpyU6WYifglA5wNmGY8_heJAeuINRT6jphuaxSzvCT0oFGQyUbZ5Xd7zJS_x_ZsiYjDnoRwVo2Ifaj5YIjTU9IlZ4dZLs3UQ%3D%3D)**
|
---
**Another Broken Promise from Phony Tony**

Anthony Brindisi promised NY-22 that he would be the one to stand up to Spectrum and Charter. Instead, he gave them the green light to form a monopoly that is now allowed to do whatever it takes to squeeze money out of Upstate New Yorkers.

clean_body: I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign Friend, here’s a quick update on what my campaign has been up to this week as we try to take back #NY22! Visiting our Friends at Revere Copper Manufacturing plants across the country have shown resilience and resolve in the face of this crisis, and Revere Copper in Rome is no exception. This week I toured their plant to see firsthand the challenges they are facing and how they are overcoming them. Thank you, Revere Copper! View and share the post | | Watch me Tear apart Pelosi’s HEROES Act - Literally Nancy Pelosi’s HEROES Act – backed by Anthony Brindisi – only serves her own liberal interests while leaving America’s real needs on the back-burner. | | Peter, did you see this?

_The Houston Chronicle_ just reported that "a Koch-backed super PAC is planning an unprecedented push into Texas" and they're going to spend **SEVEN FIGURES** on this Senate race. **[Will you rush in a donation right away to help us fight back?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890056/7f51f7bc/4e79542a/4ef6a685/693356983/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200522.2nd__1433__&amount=10")**

* **We need to fight back, right now.**

body:
On this sunny Indiana day, Hoosiers' efforts to get back to normal are making a difference. You're practicing good social distancing, good hygiene...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/getting-back-to-normal?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://howeypolitics.com/Content/Default/Lead-Story/Article/HPI-Interview-Chairman-Hupfer-at-the-nexus-of-pandemic-era-politics/-3/346/23731?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Getting Back to Normal

On this sunny Indiana day, Hoosiers' efforts to get back to normal are making a difference. You're practicing good social distancing, good hygiene, and you're wearing face coverings when you go out.

And that's allowed Governor Holcomb to speed up our reopening process a bit, moving up the start of Phase 3 to today.

That means this Memorial Day weekend, we can enjoy social gatherings of up to 100 Hoosiers, dine in at restaurants with 50% capacity, shop in retail stores with 75% capacity, work out in gyms and go camping.

Slowly but surely, because of Hoosiers' work following health and safety guidelines, things are starting to get back to normal in Indiana, while we continue to prioritize the health of Hoosiers. And that includes in the political world as well.

This week, Governor Holcomb announced a major endorsement (https://www.nwitimes.com/news/local/govt-and-politics/elections/region-building-trades-endorse-holcomb-for-second-term-as-indiana-governor/article_56d0236c-4001-5026-b302-934be681d5e6.html?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) from the Northwestern Indiana Building and Construction Trades Council. And we announced that the campaign has now surpassed another milestone – more than 1 million voter contacts (https://holcombforindiana.com/governor-holcombs-campaign-volunteers-surpasses-1-million-voter-contacts-far-cycle-reelection/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) this election cycle.

We're making progress -- but we can only keep this going together. As Governor Holcomb said, "Your actions add up and make a difference."

#INThisTogether,
- Chairman Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: This Memorial Day, please join us as we honor the men & women who paid the ultimate sacrifice to preserve our freedom.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Back on Track: Phase 3

Starting today, much of the state is entering P (https://backontrack.in.gov/files/BackOnTrack-IN_WhatsOpen-Closed-stage3.pdf?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) hase 3 (https://backontrack.in.gov/files/BackOnTrack-IN_WhatsOpen-Closed-stage3.pdf?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) of Governor Holcomb's Back on Track plan! Marion, Lake and Cass counties will go into Phase 3 (https://backontrack.in.gov/files/BackOnTrack-IN_WhatsOpen-Closed-stage3.pdf?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) on June 1. Check out what businesses are reopening & new safety guidelines below:
* Social gatherings can include up to 100 people
* Restaurant can serve customers at 50%
* Retail stores can operate at 75% capacity
* Gyms may reopen with restrictions
* Community pools and campgrounds can open
* Recreational sports practices may begin following guidelines (contact sports will need to wait)
* Basketball, tennis, soccer, baseball courts and fields may open
* Youth summer day camps may begin
* Raceways can begin competition with no spectators
* State park inns are reopening

"We've earned the ability to continue to move forward because people have been paying attention to wearing a mask, physical distancing -- it's really made a difference." – Governor Holcomb

Along the way, Governor Holcomb has said this reopening will be data-driven, and Indiana’s guiding principles remain strong:
1. Hospitalizations – The number of Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19 has dropped from 118 on April 14 to 53 on May 15.
2. Surge Capacity – 39% of Indiana’s ICU beds are currently available, along with 81% of the state’s ventilators.
3. Testing – Daily testing has increased to an average of 5,500 – 6,000 tests per day, with more than 180 testing sites (https://www.coronavirus.in.gov/2524.htm?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) available throughout the state.
4. Contact Tracing – Indiana has more than 500 contact tracers on the job right now with a capacity for 7,500 calls each day, and that’s helping limit the virus’ spread

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether, and we're getting #BackOnTrack!

Governor Holcomb Earns Union Endorsement

Governor Holcomb has earned the unanimous endorsement of the Northwestern Indiana Building and Construction Trades Council, a group of more than 30 construction unions working across Northwest Indiana. This is the first time in the council’s history that it has endorsed a Republican in a governor’s race!

The Northwestern Indiana Building and Construction Trades Council works to promote economic development, worksite safety, and apprenticeship and journey-level training. The group comprises 31 unions and more than 35,000 highly-trained, hard-working union men and women in the construction trades.

Click here (https://facebook.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80a71c2714359455775d068a2&id=315df45811&e=8c96ef18ee&mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to read the Northwestern Indiana Building and Construction Trades Council’s endorsement letter and a full list of the 31 unions endorsing Governor Holcomb.
Governor Holcomb's Reelection Campaign Volunteers
Surpassed 1 Million Voters Contacted

Governor Holcomb's reelection campaign announced that its army of volunteers throughout the state of Indiana has contacted more than 1 million voters this election cycle supporting his reelection and Republicans up and down the ballot!

Reaching this many voters in such a rapid time is a demonstration of the strength, organization, and enthusiasm of the governor’s campaign team!

--> Click here to see the full story <-- (https://holcombforindiana.com/governor-holcombs-campaign-volunteers-surpasses-1-million-voter-contacts-far-cycle-reelection/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Primary Election Resources

It’s almost time for the polls to open for the 2020 Indiana primary – with early in-person voting beginning next week:
* Early in-person voting begins on Tuesday, May 26. Check IndianaVoters.in.gov (http://indianavoters.in.gov/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to find your polling place and hours.
* Primary Day is Tuesday, June 2 – polls will be open from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. for in-person voting.
* If you’ve requested an absentee ballot, make sure it’s received by your local clerk or election division by noon on June 2.

--> Click here to view the Indiana Republican Election Resource Page <-- (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=424f48b615&e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
2020 Indiana Republican Convention Goes Virtual

In case you missed it, last week we announced that unfortunately due to restrictions because of COVID-19, we will not be able to hold the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention in person.

The Indiana Republican State Committee unanimously approved temporary rules (http://indiana.gop/sites/default/files/Temporary%20Rules.pdf?mc_cid=1559200ee1&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) that will allow us to hold a virtual contention and mail-in voting, recreating many aspects of our in-person conventions and ensuring all delegates will be able to vote.
A few important dates:
June 2 – Indiana Primary (delegates will be elected)
June 22 – Approximate date that delegates will receive ballots from a third-party vendor
July 9 – Deadline for a delegate’s ballot to be received by the third-party accounting firm
July 10 – Ballots will be counted with watchers present, and winners will be announced

More updates will continue to be provided. For more information, read Chairman Hupfer’s full letter here (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/2020-indiana-republican-convention-update?e=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) or watch his video here (https://vimeo.com/417726600?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb moves up the date for stage 3 of reopening most of Indiana (https://www.indystar.com/story/news/health/2020/05/20/when-does-indiana-reopen-gov-holcomb-moves-up-stage-3/5230331002/?mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch talks and answers questions with Indiana Builders Association (https://www.facebook.com/LGSuzanneCrouch/posts/3088849317801970?__xts__[0]=68.ARAiZo0clpMus8TRncUXCI0miJZUr24p5Ii9Cg_EgokyLNNImImcRR6d2yQ4Bvxi6MakbpoQz0Pw4rtwUOuJNosvXHhzWeAX8PCRVmpuzYm7GSi2QdmlhsFpJuqJ1NlwCLkANzb-c9_q_wWu4hZVFX_ZuRpMgh5bm2v5uloTwoxkDWp_IvR3fFPCvDayA1QluVsWrVBzDwonuVc67imeHW0ml-KZ_0zMOmkBrG2vPZSlTE5nup4tsT-0szh-aI6zHTmX511-CWRhQLfx7qRoubee-zzkvxP3txmZKLBo_3P4mj0rRFEcUABVLbk4eNEPYAMaZtG-rPfkgQDZuhNIvnuO3y-T&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=e2d2b783c0&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: The Franken Crew
subject: The Admiral's service is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We're not happy, crew. A Washington PAC spent about $1 million to run an attack ad against Admiral Franken.
|
---
| |
---

| | We're not happy, crew. A Washington PAC spent about $1 million to run an attack ad against Admiral Franken. Look, we get that this is part of politics, but certain things are off limits -- and the Admiral's 37-year service record is one of those. We need to push back against these baseless attacks. This isn't just an attack on the Admiral, but an attack on all military personnel -- active duty members, veterans, and their families. **We only have 11 days to correct the record. The Franken Defense Fund is active, but we need your help to fill it up.[Can you chip in any amount?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc648/58022059/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_l1")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc649/58022059/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_abx5")
---
[Chip in $10 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc64a/58022059/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_abx10")
---
[Chip in $25 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc64b/58022059/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_abx25")
---
[Other amount >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc644/58022059/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_abxother")
---
The Admiral spent his career defending the United States at home and abroad.
He commanded fleets, led thousands of sailors, marines, and soldiers, worked in the Senate for Ted Kennedy, and served as the Navy's chief of legislative affairs under President Obama.
And the ad from an outside group takes a shot at this service to our country.
**We have to push back immediately._[So, chip in to the Franken Defense Fund right now.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc645/58022059/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_l2")_**
[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc646/58022059/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200522_em_fr_adresponse_all_btn")
---
Thank you,
The Franken Crew

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f255a/33365068/4a7c571c/3f8bc647/58022059/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200521_em_fr_2nddebate4_all_ftr")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Outvote?=
subject: Congrats class of 2020! Time to kick off your civic participation 🎓
body:
Take inspiration from President Obama's commencement address and get involved in our democracy. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/outvote/may-22-2020?e=0aad15100c)
---
| _Organizing for everyone._
---
| | | |
---
|
---
|
**This Week in Democracy: **
---
|
---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=4253d2ece0&e=0aad15100c)
---
| In honor of the millions of students with virtual graduation ceremonies this year, Former President Barack Obama gave a commencement address to congratulate the Class of 2020.

Read the speech [here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=c229efb3d4&e=0aad15100c), or watch the full address [here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=34344613e4&e=0aad15100c).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
**Class of 2020: How to Get Involved**

---
| Dear grads: you're entering the adult world during challenging times. The global pandemic has caused unprecedented stress to nearly every system in our society. We're months away from an election that will define America for years to come.

We believe that one of the most comforting things to do is get involved. Do what you can for your local community, your city, your state, and even your country. Here are a few quick steps you can take to make sure you're ready to participate in our democracy:
* [**Confirm your voter registration**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=bd387a7905&e=0aad15100c). You may not be registered to vote yet, or need to update your registration to a new address. Either way, check your voter registration [here](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=6e219baf56&e=0aad15100c) and follow the steps to make sure you're an eligible voter.

* [**Fill out the Census**](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=ccc41e0988&e=0aad15100c). It takes 5 minutes or less, and has a big impact on things like federal funding and representation in Congress.

* **[Join your favorite campaigns and organizations on Outvote](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=bf3f7e4280&e=0aad15100c)**. The Outvote app, available on mobile or web, lets you join forces with your favorite campaigns and advocacy organizations to take action. clean_body: Take inspiration from President Obama's commencement address and get involved in our democracy. | | | | | | Organizing for everyone. | | | | | | This Week in Democracy: | | | In honor of the millions of students with virtual graduation ceremonies this year, Former President Barack Obama gave a commencement address to congratulate the Class of 2020. Read the speech , or watch the full address . | | | | Class of 2020: How to Get Involved | Dear grads: you're entering the adult world during challenging times. The global pandemic has caused unprecedented stress to nearly every system in our society. We're months away from an election that will define America for years to come. We believe that one of the most comforting things to do is get involved. Do what you can for your local community, your city, your state, and even your country. Here are a few quick steps you can take to make sure you're ready to participate in our democracy: . You may not be registered to vote yet, or need to update your registration to a new address. Either way, check your voter registration and follow the steps to make sure you're an eligible voter. . It takes 5 minutes or less, and has a big impact on things like federal funding and representation in Congress. . name: Tom Cotton
subject: NEW REPORT: Planned Parenthood received $80 million in stimulus funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
The nation’s largest abortion provider, Planned Parenthood, received $80 million in loans from the federal government according to a newly released report. Despite knowing that they were not eligible to receive funding, these Planned Parenthood affiliates still requested and received taxpayer backed loans. These funds were intended for small businesses and churches—not to prop up abortion clinics.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42563662&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MjE3MTkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NjM2NjIS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MjE3MTkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NjM2NjIS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MjE3MTkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 The nation’s largest abortion provider, Planned Parenthood, received $80 million in loans from the federal government according to a newly released report.

Despite knowing that they were not eligible to receive funding, these Planned Parenthood affiliates still requested and received taxpayer backed loans.

These funds were intended for small businesses and churches—not to prop up abortion clinics.

Sign my petition to DEMAND Planned Parenthood immediately return the money. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NjM2NjIS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MjE3MTkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

We need the Department of Justice to investigate how these abortion clinics were able to get these funds.

Despite the economic crisis hurting so many small businesses, Planned Parenthood stole taxpayer dollars to help prop up their abortion clinics.

If you are as outraged as I am, I need you to sign my petition to DEMAND Planned Parenthood immediately return the money. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1NjM2NjIS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc2MjE3MTkzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

All human life is precious, and we cannot allow abortion on-demand provider Planned Parenthood to get taxpayer funding that was meant to preserve life—not end it.

I hope you will stand with me in defense of innocent human life.In service,

Tom

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: "You Ain't Black"
body:
I woke up this morning, checked Twitter, and couldn't believe what I heard from the Democrat nominee for President. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/racist-joe-biden-5-22-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2a47b52366&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

I woke up this morning, checked Twitter, and couldn't believe what I heard from the Democrat nominee for President.

Joe Biden told a popular black radio host Friday morning that anyone struggling to decide whether to support him or President Donald Trump in the general election "ain't black."
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=acb57f8f17&e=4f010155df)
---
| Yes, that's real. [Can you help me fight back with a contribution?](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=01f06df04e&e=4f010155df)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE - STAND UP TO RACIST JOE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=958f5d917d&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE - STAND UP TO RACIST JOE")
---
| Shortly after my Tweet went viral, the Republican State Leadership Committee reached out to me to ask if I could record a video that they could broadcast nationally. You can watch [here:](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a83462a1ec&e=4f010155df)
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=687642bb4b&e=4f010155df)
---
| Joe Biden, the Democrat nominee for President, challenging millions on their blackness is so incredibly hurtful. As you know, the Republican Party was started to oppose slavery. I have the right to think and vote for myself along with all other Americans, including black Americans.

Can you show your support for people who think for themselves and don’t vote based on their skin color with a [contribution right now?](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f5914ab0f9&e=4f010155df)

For Texas,

| Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for Texas House District 113

name: James Mackler
subject: Demand safe & secure elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
There are only so many people I can meet on the bike.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11a/18d6a294/4ca389d4/26d60664/2491827757/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | It's embarrassing -- Tennessee is one of just seven states that hasn't made it safer for citizens to cast ballots in the middle of the COVID-19 pandemic. In fact, election officials have repeatedly maintained that fear of contracting COVID-19 is "not a valid excuse" to vote by mail even though more than 300 Tennesseans and 95,000 Americans of all ages have already died. Even with a surge of ballots cast in 2018, Tennessee has consistently ranked near the bottom nationwide in voter turnout. Without action, we could see even less voter participation this November. [_**Add your name to mine and demand safe and secure elections in Tennessee.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11a/18d6a294/4ca389d4/26d60665/2491827757/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200522p") | | | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11a/18d6a294/4ca389d4/26d60665/2491827757/VEsF/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200522p")
---
No one should choose between staying healthy and safe or making their voices heard in our democracy. There's too much at stake this November to risk even a single person sitting out this election because they're afraid of contracting COVID-19 or being exposed and bringing it home to a loved one.
Every Tennessean who wants to vote in the safety of their home should be able to request a mail ballot. And for people who want to vote in person, we ought to extend early voting and expand curbside voting so no one has to stand in a long line.
I've fought to defend the Constitution on the battlefield and in the courtroom, and Americans should never be forced to make an impossible choice between staying healthy and exercising our right to vote.
[_**Sign your name and demand safe and secure elections in Tennessee.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11a/18d6a294/4ca389d4/26d60665/2491827757/VEsC/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200522p")
| | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW>>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa11a/18d6a294/4ca389d4/26d60665/2491827757/VEsD/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.jamesmackler.com/e200522p")
---
In service,
James

|
---
| | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate
---
James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). In fact, election officials have repeatedly maintained that fear of contracting COVID-19 is "not a valid excuse" to vote by mail even though more than 300 Tennesseans and 95,000 Americans of all ages have already died. Even with a surge of ballots cast in 2018, Tennessee has consistently ranked near the bottom nationwide in voter turnout. Without action, we could see even less voter participation this November. "" | | | "" No one should choose between staying healthy and safe or making their voices heard in our democracy. There's too much at stake this November to risk even a single person sitting out this election because they're afraid of contracting COVID-19 or being exposed and bringing it home to a loved one. Every Tennessean who wants to vote in the safety of their home should be able to request a mail ballot. And for people who want to vote in person, we ought to extend early voting and expand curbside voting so no one has to stand in a long line. I've fought to defend the Constitution on the battlefield and in the courtroom, and Americans should never be forced to make an impossible choice between staying healthy and exercising our right to vote. "" | | "" In service, James | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com. ""

body:
Peter, this is VERY important... * |
Dear Peter, We knew the Democrats were desperate to STOP us from reaching out to Black voters, but it seems they're more frantic than we thought: **"If you have a problem figuring out whether you're for me or Trump,_then you ain't black_.**" That was Joe Biden ratcheting up the Democrats usual race-baiting scare-tactics meant to keep black voters voting for Democrats. You see, Joe Biden and Democrats know that they need at least 90% of Black voters to defeat President Trump... **...but they just saw the results of a recent nationwide poll showing that _only 81% of black voters_ support Joe Biden for President!** Our outreach efforts are working, and they know it! But with Democrats ratcheting up their race-baiting LIES, [you and I must DOUBLE DOWN](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9zcBlu&) on spreading the truth with our highly-successful radio outreach program. [Please read my email below and send your emergency support to help keep us ON THE AIR through Election Day.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EC5tztO&) _Urgently,_ \- John
---|---

* * *
| | _You're receiving this email because you're committed to defending America against rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying our values. If you're giving up on this critical fight, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=NKY6g&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EERsIyX&)_
---
|
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, First, I hope that you are well and staying safe during this uncertain time for our nation. And secondly, thank you. Because of your support, our _Faces of America_ spokespeople have been on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, New Mexico and Pennsylvania since August. It is also thanks to your support that three months ago we were able to expand and launch ads into:
* **_Michigan_** \- One supporting Black Republican SUPERSTAR John James for Senate and another opposing radical Rep. Rashida Tlaib
* **_Minnesota_** \- To defeat America-hating extremist Ilhan Omar

John James has a good chance of defeating tax and spend, pro-abortion Senator Gary Peters and Rush Limbaugh gives John James a big thumbs up...
* * *
| | "John James is what everyone would hope and pray for in a son. He is what everyone would hope for in a son-in-law and what everybody would hope for in a senator. He is a guy who grew up amazingly believing in the American dream and has lived it. He personifies it."
---
\- Rush Limbaugh
* * *
As the nation is focused on the possible financial impact and death toll due to the coronavirus, the Left continues to place blame on President Trump, not only for the outbreak of the virus itself, but for sky-rocketing unemployment and the sputtering economy.
**We all know that the coronavirus is not President Trump's fault. The blame falls solely on China.**
**More than anything, China wants to be number one in the world from an economic and a military standpoint.**
**But President Trump started getting in the way of their goal...**
When President Trump looked at all the trade agreements with China and he said "time out." And much to the chagrin of China loving Liberals in America, President Trump imposed hefty tariffs on many of the goods China imports to the United States.
They retaliated and so did President Trump which caused so much damage to their economy that they agreed to a trade agreement with the US.
But then China declared war on the world...
No shots were fired, but as of right now there is over 250,000 deaths including more than 70,000 in the U.S.
All evidence in investigations of the origin of the deadly coronavirus points to two laboratories in Wuhan, China.
Just as the terrorists did on 9-11 they have managed to shut down our economy and in all probability change the way we live our lives forever.
And they hid the severity of the virus from the entire world.
They locked down all travel from the Wuhan area but allowed infected people to travel all over the world bringing the virus to 184 different countries, sending thousands to the hospital, hundreds of thousands to the morgues, millions into quarantine and shutting down world economies.
**Democrats need to place blame where blame is due, hold China accountable and stop attacking President Trump!**
But that's just not going to happen...
President Trump has been in battle after battle with the Democrats and it has just gotten tougher. Now that Joe Biden is the "chosen one," millions of dollars from the Democratic National Committee, Michael Bloomberg and leftist, radical liberal Fat Cats will be pouring into his campaign.
Unfortunately, polls show Joe Biden with a slight lead over President Trump. And though this poll was conducted before the allegations of sexual harassment/assault by Biden's former staffer Tara Reade, **it's not good news**.
But a recent _Latino Decisions_ poll reveals a weak spot for Joe Biden and that weak spot is with Hispanic Americans. This is a huge concern for Democrats. They know if they lose the Hispanic vote, and more votes from other minorities, Biden will lose.
**We plan to use this new information to our advantage and expand and increase our ads in Hispanic markets.**
And worse than "Sleepy Joe" becoming our next President? His running mate selection.
He already vowed that his running mate would be a woman, and now some of the names floating around for consideration are socialists like Elizabeth Warren and Kamala Harris and Liberals like Stacey Abrams and...
**...HILLARY CLINTON!**
Can you imagine the irreparable damage that Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton (or Elizabeth Warren or Kamala Harris) would inflict on our country?! **And worse, what if Joe Biden can't serve and one of these left-wing radicals becomes President?**
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFlEIjr&)
We **MUST** fight tooth and nail to make sure that does not happen!
We **MUST** stay on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, New Mexico and Pennsylvania, increase our ads in Hispanic markets and expand into the states where data shows the Democrat is vulnerable.
We **MUST** continue to be laser-focused making sure minorities hear the truth about President Trump and Republicans.
Not only is that important for President Trump to defeat Joe Biden, but if we can defeat 18 Democrats in November, **Republicans will take back the House and Nancy Pelosi will be dethroned as Speaker**!
And we have the plan to do just that...
We've proven that our "Nadler Method" outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years.
"Our efforts to expand the [black] electorate were made more difficult by [their] black radio strategy... Republican messaging to the base will make base voter continuity, not to mention expansion, very difficult for Democrats."

\- Democrat Donna Brazile
Former Chairwoman of the Democratic National Committee
---
"Never-Trumpers" are blaming President Trump for the coronavirus pandemic to make sure that he does not win re-election...
**That's because, before the COVID-19 outbreak, polls showed that instead of losing support, President Trump was gaining support among minorities, Peter!**
**That's why it's imperative that we stay on the air in support of President Trump and to make sure minority voters hear the truth about the lies that the Democrats have been feeding them for decades.**
We must stay on the air and expand into the states where President Trump needs the most help (and can win) and defeat some of the most radical, socialist political incumbents.
We have paid for our radio time through May and now working to raise **$43,800** a month for June, July and August. That is just the bare minimum we need. If we raise more we'll buy more ads.
The battle for America continues, and with you by our side, we will prevail. **All we have to do is syphon off a few percentages of the minority votes from the Democrats and they will lose!**
**WE MUST FIGHT** together on behalf of President Trump's re-election and reverse the Left's march toward Socialism...
**We've come so far in four years, having another four is imperative.**
[Please RENEW your support today by sending a most generous gift of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EGFDQqZ&)
But if that is just too much for you right now, please know that any amount you feel comfortable sending is critically needed.
If you live by a monthly budget, Peter, I've set up the ability for us to process monthly recurring donations which will help greatly in our budgeting as we move forward. All you have to do is check the monthly option on the donation page, enter the amount you wish to donate monthly, and your gift will be processed around the same time every month until after the election.
There's a lot of work to do, but together, we can dispel the Liberals' Lies and take our America back.
[I trust you will do what you can.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyUzBKx&)
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. Peter, it's an honor to fight alongside you on behalf of our great Country to reverse the Left's march toward Socialism. [Your support keeps us going!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EF0Awr7&)
I'll be sending you more information and updating you regularly on our activities and election news. In the meantime, stay safe. Stay well. Please don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._

[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SweJ45&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ECh4QzB&)
---

| Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=NKY6g&mc=Jc&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ECAGQ9h&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=NKY6g&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EFHEtMH&pt=change_details) at any time.

clean_body: If you haven’t heard, 37 affiliates of Planned Parenthood, America’s number-one abortion provider, applied for and received $80 million in loans Dear Peter, If you haven’t heard, 37 affiliates of Planned Parenthood, America’s number-one abortion provider, applied for and received $80 million in loans from the Paycheck Protection Program — a federal program established for coronavirus relief! That’s right. Planned Parenthood illegally applied for and received federal funding. These loans were specifically intended for small businesses that are struggling during these uncertain and challenging times; they were not intended for giant businesses that capitalize off of the destruction of innocent lives. As President Trump and his administration demand every penny back from the deceitful affiliates who applied for, and received, the illegitimate funding, I ask for your support to ensure the abortion providers are outed and tried for their blatant lies. It’s only fair to uncover and call out those who approved the millions of dollars in illegal loans to Planned Parenthood. I ask you to support the Republicans in Congress who are currently working with our president to impart justice to those who lied to promote their own disgusting agenda with your hard-earned taxpayer dollars. From the beginning, I have been in this race to fix things. Unfortunately, this is just the most recent, clear example of the lies and deceit in Congress that needs to be fixed. Show your support for my campaign to unseat Democrat Kendra Horn, and let’s take back the House! Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | | ---|---|---|---

body:

Peter,

In less than 100 days we will be in Charlotte, North Carolina to nominate Donald Trump to serve his second term as President of the United States!

President Trump has kept his promises. He has fought to put America FIRST, whether that's providing relief to our small businesses, building the wall or delivering historic tax cuts to ALL Americans.

Radical Democrats, however, have admitted in their private meetings with socialist mega-donors that their only priority in 2020 is to _remove President Trump from office and roll back all the achievements we 've made in the last 4 years._

We can't let that happen.

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: "Republicans fear loss of Senate control"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Each and every day, Democrats are gaining momentum in the fight for control of the Senate.
In fact, the _Los Angeles Times_ just reported that "Republicans fear loss of Senate control" in November as a consequence of President Trump's "unsteady" response to the pandemic.
The article also notes that "Senate Democratic challengers far surpassed their Republican opponents in the first three months of 2020" \-- another clear sign that we can win this fight.
**[But the only way that will happen is if we all stand together and defend our Democratic Senate champions like Gary Peters and elect new Democrats like Cal Cunningham and Mark Kelly. Will you split a $5 contribution right now to support their campaigns?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200521-senate-slate?refcode=em200521i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Democrats need to flip four seats this November to reclaim a Senate majority. And we've been getting some encouraging signs that Arizona and North Carolina can be two of those seats.
In Arizona, a brand new poll shows the Republican incumbent losing to Democrat Mark Kelly. It's clear that voters in Arizona are ready for a proven leader who will fight for them -- not more of the extreme partisanship and obstruction they've come to expect from the GOP.
And in North Carolina, Cal Cunningham is also leading his Republican opponent in the polls in a state that President Trump won in 2016. This is another exciting opportunity for Democrats to flip a red seat blue -- and elect a public servant who will fight for North Carolina and our nation.
But we need to do more than win GOP-held seats this November -- we also must come together to re-elect every Democratic Senator on the ballot this year, like Gary Peters in Michigan. We know that President Trump and the GOP will stop at nothing to win this state in 2020. That's why it's more important than ever that we defend Gary's seat in this crucial Senate race.
**[Our Sprint to 2020 program is already helping to give Democrats across the country a needed boost in support during this crisis -- but with so much on the line we can't stop now. Pitch in $5 to support Cal Cunningham, Mark Kelly, and Gary Peters.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200521-senate-slate?refcode=em200521i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200521-senate-slate?refcode=em200521i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6932fa/22080b68/7b471063/46020994/3513752131/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Why I decided to run for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
_Team Rosen understands that this is a trying time for our families and our nation. We hope that you and your loved ones are safe and healthy during this pandemic. While this crisis is keeping Democrats off of the campaign trail for the time being, our fight for victory in November continues. Please only make a contribution if you are able to do so. We appreciate your support._

Team,
Thank you for being part of the fight to take back the Senate. Senator Rosen said I could reach out to you today about our must-win race here in Arizona.
Recently, we've been inundated with news that has made me reflect on why I decided to run for Senate.
**I decided to run for Senate because for too long we 've watched partisan politics grind our country to a halt in its most challenging moments. I'm running to put an end to that and to make sure the people of Arizona have a strong ally in Congress.**
[I want to win this race and be that independent voice, so I'm counting on folks like you to make a contribution to our people-powered campaign. Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen today?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409de2cc/4fbb2af3/2184d725/5e801d69/1727182482/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItbWFyay1rZWxseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA1MjJpIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-mark-kelly?refcode=em200522i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Arizonans and Americans expect their elected leaders to rely on science, data, and facts when making decisions that will impact people's lives.
And that's exactly what I plan to do, but I can only get there with help from folks like you.
Thank you for being with me on this mission, your support means so much to me.
Mark Kelly

** **
**[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409de2cc/4fbb2af3/2184d725/5e801d69/1727182482/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItbWFyay1rZWxseSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA1MjJpIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-mark-kelly?refcode=em200522i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Safety first this weekend (and always)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
But what resources are available to help make sure our Indiana businesses are
staying safe, too?

<>
Friends,

This weekend, Hoosiers across the state will be getting out and enjoying their
Memorial Day weekend.

And while we’re out and about, it’s important that we’re being safe – and that
we know the businesses we’re visiting are being safe, too. Hoosiers deserve to
know everyone is taking the necessary precautions to show their Hoosier
hospitality and keep us safe.

You know what you need to do to be safe – wear your mask, keep a six foot
social distance, wash your hands frequently, use hand sanitizer, etc.

But what resources are available to help make sure our Indiana businesses are
staying safe, too?

* PPE: The Indiana Small Business PPE Marketplace has already shipped more
than 20,000 bundles of PPE to our Hoosier small businesses – which includes
masks, hand sanitizer and face shields. The state expects to ship 90,000 PPE
bundles by June 24.
* Critical Agencies Hotline: With the launch of Phase 3 today, businesses
likely have some questions about what’s required for them to open. They can get
answers by calling the Indiana Critical Agencies Hotline at 877-820-0890 or by
emailing covidresponse@iedc.in.gov.
* Occupancy Concerns: If you have questions or concerns about a businesses’
occupancy limits or code enforcement, you can contact the Indiana Department of
Homeland Security (IDHS) or your local fire marshal. You can reach the IDHS at
codequestions@dhs.in.gov.
Like Governor Holcomb has said, the hard part starts now. We’ve all done a
great job hunkering down at home – and now as we begin to return to our normal
routines, it’s critical that we continue to do our part to keep our fellow
Hoosiers safe.

Have a safe and fun Memorial Day weekend, Hoosiers!

#BackonTrack,

-Your Holcomb Crew

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=df0f6603b5294280b025b98f901ef5d3&_t=OXgOdEUvp0i7dTqsoaw4j9tZAnbAg9lmGposLEQCAgCIPcENNhB_B5INiePOqLlA-ow5ynmrzJHLVIcJCDpY7bI4zD2W79w4xdmqIM0ixujf5QjKPNDs21QkhcpZ6GW7My403LZuXlUkpEV8lY0GEH7etWR5BwlBGJo28Z8JYUs%3D>

They can get answers by calling the Indiana Critical Agencies Hotline at 877-820-0890 or by emailing covidresponse@iedc.in.gov. * Occupancy Concerns: If you have questions or concerns about a businesses’ occupancy limits or code enforcement, you can contact the Indiana Department of Homeland Security (IDHS) or your local fire marshal. You can reach the IDHS at codequestions@dhs.in.gov. Like Governor Holcomb has said, the hard part starts now. We’ve all done a great job hunkering down at home – and now as we begin to return to our normal routines, it’s critical that we continue to do our part to keep our fellow Hoosiers safe. Have a safe and fun Memorial Day weekend, Hoosiers! #BackonTrack, -Your Holcomb Crew Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709

name: Bloomberg Philanthropies
subject: Dr. Anthony Fauci: "When you leave it up to the locals, particularly mayors and governors who have the responsibility for leading, it gets done much better."
body:
What Dr. Fauci and Mike shared this week

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6cdb50372bd64f16ae96632ecf3119fe&_e=TydybO4dsLyZZywoH07cwR7yKkY7KXoAkCh61k5u6e9J2Jeh8NKN4rofvM2lRXRphFNKeE49PmMsJLFtdoWfMFhi1z8L_z5Duot0kenXmOPa_B7kPApKmce-RAte21B2wyJEECjpSvevBfJIIhQ1hNqUKZ-TP2X54J75e8Yq5KXKBbdEPRblHJ1DNdMHmzDn5gLnIuvLa3uPeeA6ASpydS0axWtW7NpbV86ZJ_xv_adWeLw4akuMwP7-96NeP3SPnKQbux4f1FgZcmaBATBOUz1hTG_26oijclr31Rs5MabDeV5l_6OW4eCvt3k4hBQt) Friend, _"My experience is, that when you leave it up to the locals, particularly mayors and governors who have the responsibility for leading, it gets done much better than anyone else."_ That was Dr. Anthony Fauci's message this week at a virtual session with Mike and local leaders from more than 300 cities around the world. As the Director of the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases, Dr. Fauci is a leading figure in the pandemic response and a source of expert insights. In the conversation, he shared perspectives on safely reopening our communities, the need for robust testing to prevent a resurgence of infections, and the importance of local leadership: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6cdb50372bd64f16ae96632ecf3119fe&_e=TydybO4dsLyZZywoH07cwYyN3bzvlcQPISkOrcQw_DAJ6YP6RdjNap90qc_6Ci6rrlSD0TbakGZ0vccx7STDtK3n0DCAXowuDy8fiVFMwehrrOwMJk7nm1ugiudza-o2B5ZQW9yYs_BsVTILSSXyRRbn146ZZ4mZneILu6Myr2M85SLVIMeLDWh0UF2jNXdzGToWCsB3bfqtwxGjkB3qXAyxD0VRHGLz-G3EQaJvFug9qHhyaQtvkV7JUx1gOnb5fzcIYZR3z8ISks1hMfVRIdOSgBRIMCQphfdMrUvzEuZd2g1Jrg6SMxJcZmqC91-06A6RgPYCNxctuC9MVI-dtXJ9ZrcsMnU1QH3x8XxMC8eiLRY5b3155Kwn4K8kDbh3) | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6cdb50372bd64f16ae96632ecf3119fe&_e=TydybO4dsLyZZywoH07cwYyN3bzvlcQPISkOrcQw_DAJ6YP6RdjNap90qc_6Ci6rrlSD0TbakGZ0vccx7STDtK3n0DCAXowuDy8fiVFMwehrrOwMJk7nm1ugiudza-o2B5ZQW9yYs_BsVTILSSXyRRbn146ZZ4mZneILu6Myr2O6Pf4hJMRRy2GUNGg1hwWn4z8TqmKdY0vIUrJi9bLrhrRPap_F-I-J40HHYzMkQqYC5K-mPSkwVpPN6l1aDZwCyuT2Ie38Hh7WKn_qRMbwzIP_1-EoaijNA-VlkQu9vsMi3Cl7Dee-feNNgFa-zACvGBuFgxHE9TuV8FI2JxZMLvEX9P-nedCKsRWHHmz4DRiLQ68Aoi3CwN3bfGYMr_l9) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6cdb50372bd64f16ae96632ecf3119fe&_e=TydybO4dsLyZZywoH07cwd3ZYuQoJ_M8oJ35BKdn9ajAc7CqLyOLeMAY9TNNsY1C-a5SU1c7pwSAL0e86xtmXRP1vby_GX1gJeHUbPqyY4om3UWWohdHMsFHb8mbNl1cYwXM9D1oRmK3dIBAPBHx_2t32CXdEWSnm6TXMqKW4kMHhz0X3_qn0A6b8Vq-2h6e1C6zBslQowAoXfpTlY4ZLN34DcKxuyDLHDBKcW4QhO5cSgk2KXR2OAVsmKqzvk6sW_cfEJhXhq1Exz5zBUnHTvC9GeJM_E-11YCJcv4msR3q-hnWE3gwHlS_LE30zMSdGyqBNp98UBxWhN5TWAbCVbjcFc2U1pA2omIVs4NdCIS62Wcok9OQfleH8OqkK9DI1OWel5gILzg-v0-IYXLILGosy0yiwV_oaZH0l1csygcBMhyoUwkQLrCcJV58wxyxjMI41_O6HNtSq6pjkq-KeBWS0mUA_OmuHroGmMdyk5s%3D)
---|---|---
Providing access to expertise is a key component of Bloomberg Philanthropies' ongoing work to support mayors and local teams on the front lines. As Mike said in the virtual session: "The key to getting through this crisis as safely as possible is listening to experts and making decisions based on science. We're helping to fill some of those data and information gaps with these virtual sessions -- and each week the public health experts are joining us to give it to you straight, without any politics."
Read more about Dr. Fauci's participation in this week's virtual convening of mayors, and our continuing work to support the social and economic wellbeing of cities:
[**https://bloombg.org/3cWXcxQ**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=6cdb50372bd64f16ae96632ecf3119fe&_e=TydybO4dsLyZZywoH07cwR7yKkY7KXoAkCh61k5u6e8tFNb-ZAahWek9k7adoUzR4F6TH9CHOgeXBgQwm9YV-7D-lqzkJN0HMUVwYNFlM-swnXa_OEkhxbre6cPpjAP-dwoPguZWq1BdpvwDTZGNNbAISMgKG8BpZA5EXqpcC1FP90ou9nKZ2BtLhWOjLfpyRBHirce-D9Gjpzm7OkdVEk2-066JflWT0jctwoiCEWpjD2G1KbQ7u3O7A0_r4JjNK0bgFjHuxbUlA-5MDmGt-vZW7GXu1reyGrR2V9CurD1NUai_JrLRypnkGGqTykbE18LIzBQTt9JgTMS6Hn3r68g5LncMNptnCQTRQ4D7zzMnlQvTdBhfRLNGjzNtc-sET7r9Mg4mAD3hUgBVXjgZJcWK38ZW3B1TlClM3mdWed2Cstp8f82AMtI3fVxOULBEFKSnBiF1CM6gJSy_TzB6OfKRVeMoAStL400AtaOBFqguCXdjyTJE-Pf_KOBxABWxmOSt1ZLZaV0GTnu2TS-O_ocsiey0bN8jU7fHJ7MkheI%3D)
